description: Retrieves data from rail_stations, training_calendars, divisions, users, rail_zones, tra_masters for the admission-action page.
complete_sql: SELECT tm.*, us.name,us.father_name,z.zone_code,rs.st_code, d.div_code,tc.batch_no,tc.course_code,tc.program_name FROM tra_masters tm LEFT JOIN users us ON us.id = tm.user_id LEFT JOIN divisions d ON d.id = tm.div_id LEFT JOIN rail_zones z ON z.id = tm.zone_id LEFT JOIN rail_stations rs ON rs.id = tm.station_id LEFT JOIN training_calendars tc ON tc.id = tm.course_id WHERE tm.status = 1 AND (tc.from_date<= '$current_date') AND tm.is_approved=0 $whr AND tm.office_id =".$_OFFICE_ID." ORDER BY us.name,z.zone_code,d.div_code ASC

description: Retrieves data from rail_zones, tra_masters, training_calendars, all_dues for the all dues page.
complete_sql: SELECT tc.program_name,tc.id, rz.zone_code, rz.id AS zone_id, MAX(ad.library) AS library, MAX(ad.mess) AS mess, MAX(ad.hostel) AS hostel, MAX(ad.sports) AS sports, MAX(ad.store) AS store FROM training_calendars tc LEFT JOIN tra_masters tm ON tm.course_id = tc.id LEFT JOIN rail_zones rz ON tm.zone_id = rz.id LEFT JOIN all_dues ad ON tc.id = ad.course_id AND ad.zone_id = rz.id WHERE tc.status = 1 AND tc.id IN ($course_id) AND tm.zone_id IS NOT NULL AND rz.zone_code IS NOT NULL GROUP BY tc.program_name, rz.id, rz.zone_code ORDER BY tc.program_name, rz.zone_code

description: Retrieves data from rail_zones, tra_masters, training_calendars, all_dues for the all dues page.
complete_sql: SELECT tc.program_name,tc.id, rz.zone_code, rz.id AS zone_id, MAX(ad.library) AS library, MAX(ad.mess) AS mess, MAX(ad.hostel) AS hostel, MAX(ad.sports) AS sports, MAX(ad.store) AS store FROM training_calendars tc LEFT JOIN tra_masters tm ON tm.course_id = tc.id LEFT JOIN rail_zones rz ON tm.zone_id = rz.id LEFT JOIN all_dues ad ON tc.id = ad.course_id AND ad.zone_id = rz.id WHERE tc.status = 1 AND tc.id IN ($course_id) GROUP BY tc.program_name, rz.id, rz.zone_code ORDER BY tc.program_name, rz.zone_code

description: Retrieves data from training_calendars, course_groups, course_for, courses, tra_masters for the attendance course wise page.
complete_sql: SELECT cf.id as cf_id, cf.course_for,cf.types as cf_types, cf.types_name,cf.sort_no, tm.user_id, tm.zone_id, tc.id as course_id, tc.ct_id, cs.cs_duration, cs.week_days,cs.cs_code,cs.course_name, cg.course_group,cg.types as cg_types,tc.* FROM training_calendars tc LEFT JOIN tra_masters tm ON tm.course_id = tc.id AND tm.is_approved=1 LEFT JOIN course_for cf ON cf.id = tc.cf_id LEFT JOIN courses cs ON cs.id = tc.ct_id LEFT JOIN course_groups cg ON cg.id = tc.cg_id WHERE tc.status = 1 AND tc.fail_status=0 ORDER BY cf.sort_no ASC

description: Retrieves data from subjects, cbt_blue_prints for the cbt blue print page.
complete_sql: SELECT cbp.*,s.subject_name,mcq_total,essay_total ,mark_mcq_total,mark_essay_total FROM cbt_blue_prints cbp LEFT JOIN subjects AS s ON s.id=cbp.subject_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT exam_id, SUM(CASE WHEN q_type = 1 THEN ques ELSE 0 END) AS mcq_total, SUM(CASE WHEN q_type = 2 THEN ques ELSE 0 END) AS essay_total, SUM(CASE WHEN q_type = 1 THEN total_mark ELSE 0 END) AS mark_mcq_total, SUM(CASE WHEN q_type = 2 THEN total_mark ELSE 0 END) AS mark_essay_total FROM cbt_blue_prints WHERE status = 1 GROUP BY exam_id ) t ON t.exam_id = cbp.exam_id WHERE cbp.exam_id= :exam_id AND cbp.status=1 ORDER BY cbp.id DESC

description: Retrieves data from mdl_quiz_attempts, mdl_user, mdl_grade_grades, mdl_quiz, mdl_course, mdl_grade_items for the cbt marks entry page.
complete_sql: SELECT DISTINCT u.id as user_id,u.idnumber,u.firstname,u.lastname ,q.id AS quiz_id,q.name AS quizname,c.id AS course_id,c.fullname AS coursename,CASE WHEN gg.finalgrade = FLOOR(gg.finalgrade) THEN FLOOR(gg.finalgrade) ELSE FORMAT(gg.finalgrade, 2) END AS finalgrade, gg.rawgrade FROM mdl_grade_grades gg INNER JOIN mdl_grade_items gi ON gi.id = gg.itemid INNER JOIN mdl_quiz q ON q.id = gi.iteminstance INNER JOIN mdl_course c ON c.id = gi.courseid INNER JOIN mdl_user u ON u.id = gg.userid INNER JOIN mdl_quiz_attempts qa ON qa.quiz = q.id AND qa.userid = u.id WHERE gi.itemtype = 'mod' AND gi.itemmodule = 'quiz' AND c.id = ".$course_id." AND q.id = ".$quiz_id." AND qa.state = 'finished' ORDER BY fullname

description: Retrieves data from rail_stations, divisions, users, cbt_marks, rail_zones, designations for the cbt marks entry page.
complete_sql: SELECT c.*,d.desi_code, di.div_code, rz.zone_code, rs.st_code, u.father_name as f_name,u.name FROM cbt_marks c LEFT JOIN users as u on u.id = c.user_idnumber LEFT JOIN designations d ON d.id = u.desi_id LEFT JOIN divisions as di ON di.id=u.div_id LEFT JOIN rail_zones as rz ON rz.id=u.zone_id LEFT JOIN rail_stations as rs ON rs.id=u.station_id Where c.mdl_course_id = ".$course_id." AND c.mdl_quiz_id = ".$quiz_id." AND c.status=1

complete_sql: select cf.id as cf_id, cf.course_for,cf.types as cf_types, cf.types_name,cf.sort_no, tm.user_id, tm.zone_id, tc.id as course_id, tc.ct_id, cs.cs_duration, cs.week_days, rz.zone_name,rz.zrti_type, cg.course_group,cg.types as cg_types,tc.* FROM training_calendars tc LEFT JOIN tra_masters tm ON tm.course_id = tc.id AND tm.is_approved=1 LEFT JOIN course_for cf ON cf.id = tc.cf_id LEFT JOIN courses cs ON cs.id = tc.ct_id LEFT JOIN rail_zones rz ON rz.id = tm.zone_id LEFT JOIN course_groups cg ON cg.id = tc.cg_id WHERE tc.status = 1 AND tc.fail_status=0 AND '".$daily_date."' between tc.from_date AND tc.to_date ORDER BY cf.sort_no ASC

description: Retrieves data from training_calendars, course_groups, rail_zones, course_for, courses, tra_masters for the daily position page.
complete_sql: select cf.id as cf_id, cf.course_for,cf.types as cf_types, cf.types_name,cf.sort_no, tm.user_id, tm.zone_id, tc.id as course_id, tc.ct_id, cs.cs_duration, cs.week_days, rz.zone_name,rz.zrti_type, cg.course_group,cg.types as cg_types,tc.*,(DATEDIFF(tc.extended_date, tc.to_date)) - ( FLOOR((DATEDIFF(tc.extended_date, tc.to_date) + (DAYOFWEEK(tc.to_date) - 1)) / 7) ) AS working_days_without_sundays FROM training_calendars tc LEFT JOIN tra_masters tm ON tm.course_id = tc.id AND tm.is_approved=1 LEFT JOIN course_for cf ON cf.id = tc.cf_id LEFT JOIN courses cs ON cs.id = tc.ct_id LEFT JOIN rail_zones rz ON rz.id = tm.zone_id LEFT JOIN course_groups cg ON cg.id = tc.cg_id WHERE tc.status = 1 AND tc.fail_status=1 AND '".$daily_date."' between tc.from_date AND tc.extended_date ORDER BY cf.sort_no ASC

description: Counts records in last_attempts, tra_masters, training_calendars, users for the dashboard.inc page.
complete_sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN nextdue_date BETWEEN '$cm_start' AND '$cm_end' THEN user_id END) AS current_month, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN nextdue_date BETWEEN '$nm_start' AND '$nm_end' THEN user_id END) AS next_month, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN nextdue_date BETWEEN '$m3_start' AND '$m3_end' THEN user_id END) AS third_month, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN nextdue_date BETWEEN '$m6_start' AND '$m6_end' THEN user_id END) AS sixth_month FROM (SELECT us.id AS user_id,(CASE WHEN tc.cf_id IN (2,5) AND tc.cg_id = 2 THEN DATE_ADD(tc.to_date, INTERVAL 3 YEAR) - INTERVAL 1 DAY WHEN tc.cf_id = 3 AND tc.cg_id = 2 THEN DATE_ADD(tc.to_date, INTERVAL 4 YEAR) - INTERVAL 1 DAY WHEN tc.cf_id IN (7,8,9) AND tc.cg_id = 2 THEN DATE_ADD(tc.to_date, INTERVAL 5 YEAR) - INTERVAL 1 DAY ELSE NULL END) AS nextdue_date FROM tra_masters tm INNER JOIN (SELECT user_id, MAX(id) AS last_id FROM tra_masters GROUP BY user_id) x ON x.last_id = tm.id LEFT JOIN training_calendars tc ON tc.id = tm.course_id LEFT JOIN users us ON us.id = tm.user_id WHERE us.status = 1 UNION ALL SELECT us.id AS user_id, la.nextdue_date FROM last_attempts la LEFT JOIN users us ON us.id = la.user_id WHERE us.status = 1) all_data WHERE nextdue_date IS NOT NULL

description: Retrieves data from training_calendars, course_groups, rail_zones, course_for, courses, tra_masters for the dashboard.inc page.
complete_sql: select cf.id as cf_id, cf.course_for,cf.types as cf_types, cf.types_name,cf.sort_no, tm.user_id, tm.zone_id, tc.id as course_id, tc.ct_id, cs.cs_duration, cs.week_days, rz.zone_name,rz.zrti_type, cg.course_group,cg.types as cg_types,tc.* FROM training_calendars tc LEFT JOIN tra_masters tm ON tm.course_id = tc.id AND tm.is_approved=1 LEFT JOIN course_for cf ON cf.id = tc.cf_id LEFT JOIN courses cs ON cs.id = tc.ct_id LEFT JOIN rail_zones rz ON rz.id = tm.zone_id LEFT JOIN course_groups cg ON cg.id = tc.cg_id WHERE tc.status = 1 AND CURRENT_DATE BETWEEN tc.from_date AND COALESCE(NULLIF(tc.extended_date, '0000-00-00'), tc.to_date) ORDER BY cf.sort_no ASC

description: Retrieves data from feed_master, rail_zones, tra_masters, training_calendars for the dashboard.inc page.
complete_sql: SELECT tc.*,fm.*,rz.zone_code,tr.zone_id FROM training_calendars tc LEFT JOIN feed_master AS fm ON fm.course_id=tc.id LEFT JOIN tra_masters AS tr ON tr.user_id=fm.user_id LEFT JOIN rail_zones AS rz ON rz.id=tr.zone_id WHERE fm.fq_id = 28 AND fm.status = 1 AND fm.response!='' AND fm.final_submit=1 AND tc.status!=2 AND NOT (tc.from_date > '$graph_to_date' OR tc.to_date < '$graph_from_date') ORDER BY tc.from_date

description: Retrieves data from feed_master, rail_zones, tra_masters, training_calendars for the dashboard.inc page.

description: Counts records in tra_masters, training_calendars for the dashboard.inc page.
complete_sql: SELECT tc.id AS course_id, tc.program_name, tc.from_date,tc.to_date,tc.extended_date,tc.fail_status, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT tc.id ORDER BY tc.id) AS ids, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT tc.batch_no ORDER BY tc.batch_no SEPARATOR ', ') AS batch_numbers, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN tm.is_approved = 1 THEN tm.id END) AS total_admission_approve FROM training_calendars tc LEFT JOIN tra_masters tm ON tm.course_id = tc.id WHERE tc.status = 1 AND ('$dates' BETWEEN tc.from_date AND tc.to_date) AND tc.office_id = ".$_OFFICE_ID." GROUP BY tc.program_name, DATE(tc.from_date) ORDER BY tc.from_date ASC

description: Counts records in tra_masters, training_calendars for the dashboard.inc page.
complete_sql: SELECT tc.id AS course_id, tc.program_name, tc.from_date,tc.to_date, // GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT tc.id ORDER BY tc.id) AS ids, // GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT tc.batch_no ORDER BY tc.batch_no SEPARATOR ', ') AS batch_numbers, // COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN tm.is_approved = 1 THEN tm.id END) AS total_admission_approve // FROM training_calendars tc // LEFT JOIN tra_masters tm ON tm.course_id = tc.id // WHERE tc.status = 1 AND NOT (tc.from_date > '$todates' OR tc.from_date < '$formdates') AND tc.office_id = ".$_OFFICE_ID." // GROUP BY tc.program_name, DATE(tc.from_date) // ORDER BY tc.from_date ASC

description: Retrieves data from tra_masters, training_calendars, users for the dashboard.inc page.
complete_sql: SELECT tm.*, tc.*, em.*, tc.id as tc_id ,tm.is_approved as tm_approved from tra_masters tm LEFT JOIN training_calendars as tc ON tm.course_id=tc.id left join users as em on em.id=tm.user_id WHERE tm.user_id = $user_id AND tc.from_date <= CURDATE() AND tc.to_date >= CURDATE()order by tc.to_date DESC

description: Retrieves data from training_calendars, courses for the dashboard.inc page.

description: Retrieves data from training_calendars, study_tour, users, designations for the dashboard.inc page.
complete_sql:
SELECT st.id AS study_id,st.*, us.name, ds.desi_code, ds.desi_name, GROUP_CONCAT(CONCAT(tc.program_name, ' - ', tc.course_code, ' ', tc.batch_no, ' (', DATE_FORMAT(tc.from_date, '%d-%b-%y'), ' to ', DATE_FORMAT(tc.to_date, '%d-%b-%y'), ')') SEPARATOR '
') AS course_info FROM study_tour st LEFT JOIN users us ON us.id = st.staff_id LEFT JOIN designations ds ON ds.id = st.staff_desi_id LEFT JOIN training_calendars tc ON FIND_IN_SET(tc.id, st.course_id) WHERE st.status = 1 AND st.s_status = 1 AND st.forward_id=".$_SESSION['user']['id']." GROUP BY st.id ORDER BY DATE(st.from_date) ASC

complete_sql:
SELECT s.*, GROUP_CONCAT( DISTINCT CASE WHEN st.id = 2000 THEN CONCAT(st.sub_topic, ' - ', s.topic_des)ELSE st.sub_topic END ORDER BY st.id SEPARATOR '
') AS toic_name FROM seminars s LEFT JOIN seminars_topic st ON FIND_IN_SET(st.id, s.topic_id) WHERE s.status = 1 AND s.se_status=1 AND s.forward_id=".$_SESSION['user']['id']." GROUP BY s.id ORDER BY s.id

description: Retrieves data from field_training, training_calendars, users for the dashboard.inc page.
complete_sql:
SELECT ft.*, us.name, GROUP_CONCAT(CONCAT(tc.program_name, ' - ', tc.course_code, ' ', tc.batch_no, ' (', DATE_FORMAT(tc.from_date, '%d-%b-%y'), ' to ', DATE_FORMAT(tc.to_date, '%d-%b-%y'), ')') SEPARATOR '
') AS course_info FROM field_training ft LEFT JOIN users us ON us.id = ft.created_by LEFT JOIN training_calendars tc ON FIND_IN_SET(tc.id, ft.course_id) WHERE ft.status = 1 AND ft.f_status=1 AND ft.forward_id=".$_SESSION['user']['id']." GROUP BY ft.id ORDER BY DATE(ft.from_date) ASC

description: Retrieves data from inspection_notes, inspection_description for the dashboard.inc page.
complete_sql: SELECT i.* ,ide.id as d_id from inspection_description ide left join inspection_notes as i on i.id=ide.insp_id WHERE FIND_IN_SET(:user_id, ide.faculty_id) > 0 AND ide.status=1 AND i.status=1 AND ide.i_status IN (0,1,2) AND ide.office_id=1 group by i.id ORDER BY i.from_date ASC

description: Counts records in tra_masters, training_calendars for the dashboard.inc page.
complete_sql: SELECT MAX(tc.id) AS course_id, tc.program_name, tc.from_date, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT tc.id ORDER BY tc.id) AS ids, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT tc.batch_no ORDER BY tc.batch_no SEPARATOR ', ') AS batch_numbers, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN tm.is_approved = 1 AND DATE(tm.is_approved_date) = '$current_date' THEN tm.id END) AS today_admission_count, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN tm.is_approved != 2 THEN tm.id END) AS total_register_count, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN tm.is_approved = 1 THEN tm.id END) AS total_admission_approve FROM training_calendars tc LEFT JOIN tra_masters tm ON tm.course_id = tc.id AND tm.is_approved != 2 WHERE tc.status = 1 AND (tc.from_date BETWEEN '$from_date' AND '$to_date') AND tc.office_id = ".$_OFFICE_ID." GROUP BY tc.program_name, DATE(tc.from_date) ORDER BY tc.from_date ASC

description: Counts records in hostel_masters, tra_masters, training_calendars for the dashboard.inc page.
complete_sql: SELECT MAX(tc.id) AS course_id, tc.program_name, tc.from_date, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT tc.id ORDER BY tc.id) AS ids, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN hm.h_status = 1 THEN hm.id END) AS booked_count, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN tm.out_stay = 1 THEN tm.id END) AS outstay_count FROM training_calendars tc LEFT JOIN hostel_masters hm ON hm.course_id = tc.id LEFT JOIN tra_masters tm ON tm.course_id = tc.id WHERE tc.status = 1 AND (tc.from_date BETWEEN '$from_date' AND '$to_date') AND tc.office_id = ".$_OFFICE_ID." GROUP BY tc.program_name, DATE(tc.from_date) ORDER BY tc.from_date ASC

description: Counts records in tra_masters, training_calendars for the dashboard.inc page.
complete_sql: SELECT tc.id AS course_id, tc.program_name, tc.from_date,tc.to_date,tc.extended_date,tc.fail_status, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT tc.id ORDER BY tc.id) AS ids, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT tc.batch_no ORDER BY tc.batch_no SEPARATOR ', ') AS batch_numbers, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN tm.is_approved = 1 THEN tm.id END) AS total_admission_approve FROM training_calendars tc LEFT JOIN tra_masters tm ON tm.course_id = tc.id WHERE tc.status = 1 AND tc.to_date='$dates' AND tc.office_id = ".$_OFFICE_ID." GROUP BY tc.program_name, DATE(tc.from_date) ORDER BY tc.from_date ASC

description: Retrieves data from rail_stations, training_calendars, divisions, users, hostel_masters, rail_zones, tra_masters for the dashboard.inc page.
complete_sql: SELECT tm.id,tm.application_id,tm.out_stay,tm.user_id,tm.course_id, us.name,us.father_name,z.zone_code,rs.st_code, d.div_code,tc.batch_no,tc.course_code,tc.program_name FROM tra_masters tm LEFT JOIN users us ON us.id = tm.user_id LEFT JOIN divisions d ON d.id = tm.div_id LEFT JOIN rail_zones z ON z.id = tm.zone_id LEFT JOIN rail_stations rs ON rs.id = tm.station_id JOIN training_calendars tc ON tc.id = tm.course_id AND (tc.to_date >= CURRENT_DATE() OR (tc.extended_date <> '0000-00-00' AND tc.extended_date >= CURRENT_DATE())) WHERE tm.status = 1 AND tm.is_approved=1 AND tm.out_stay = 0 AND tm.user_id NOT IN (SELECT user_id FROM hostel_masters WHERE user_id= tm.user_id AND course_id = tm.course_id) $whs AND tm.office_id =".$_OFFICE_ID." ORDER BY us.name,z.zone_code,d.div_code ASC

description: Counts records in hostel_masters, hostel_buildings, hostel_rooms for the dashboard.inc page.
complete_sql: SELECT hb.id,hb.location, COALESCE(r.total_capacity, 0) AS total_capacity, COALESCE(m.occu_bed, 0) AS occu_bed, COALESCE(s.occu_beds, 0) AS occu_beds, COALESCE(mb.maintance_bed, 0) AS maintance_bed FROM hostel_buildings hb LEFT JOIN (SELECT building_id, SUM(room_beds) AS total_capacity FROM hostel_rooms WHERE status = 1 GROUP BY building_id) r ON r.building_id = hb.id LEFT JOIN (SELECT building_id, COUNT(beds) AS occu_bed FROM hostel_masters WHERE (h_status != 2 AND h_status != 4) AND plusbed=0 AND CURRENT_DATE BETWEEN date(in_date) AND date(out_date) GROUP BY building_id) m ON m.building_id = hb.id LEFT JOIN (SELECT building_id, COUNT(beds) AS maintance_bed FROM hostel_masters WHERE (h_status != 1 AND h_status != 2 AND h_status != 4) AND plusbed=0 GROUP BY building_id) mb ON mb.building_id = hb.id LEFT JOIN (SELECT building_id, COUNT(beds) AS occu_beds FROM hostel_masters WHERE (h_status != 2 AND h_status != 4) AND plusbed=1 AND CURRENT_DATE BETWEEN date(in_date) AND date(out_date) GROUP BY building_id) s ON s.building_id = hb.id WHERE hb.status = 1 ORDER BY hb.location ASC

description: Retrieves data from roles, users, designations for the division-user-list page.
complete_sql: SELECT us.name, us.email, us.mobile, us.desi_id, us.is_approved, us.id, d.desi_code, r.role_name FROM users us LEFT JOIN roles r ON us.role_id = r.id left join designations as d on d.id=us.desi_id where us.status=1 AND us.role_id IN (5,6,7)

description: Retrieves data from rail_zones for the divisions page.
complete_sql: SELECT * FROM rail_zones WHERE status=1 order by id desc

description: Retrieves data from divisions for the divisions page.
complete_sql: SELECT * FROM divisions WHERE id= :id AND status<=1

description: Retrieves data from rail_zones, divisions for the divisions page.
complete_sql: SELECT dv.*,rz.zone_name FROM divisions dv left join rail_zones rz on rz.id=dv.zone_id WHERE dv.status<=1 order by dv.id desc

description: Retrieves data from eqs for the eq apply page.
complete_sql: select * from eqs where status=1 AND id =

description: Retrieves data from eqs for the eq list page.
complete_sql: select * from eqs where user_id =$id AND status=1

description: Retrieves data from eqs, users for the eq view page.
complete_sql: SELECT *,us.name, us.mobile FROM eqs eq LEFT JOIN users us ON us.id=eq.user_id WHERE eq.id =

description: Retrieves data from users for the et design - Copy page.
complete_sql: SELECT * FROM users where status=1 AND role_id=3 AND is_approved=1 AND office_id=".$_OFFICE_ID." order by id desc

description: Retrieves data from sessions for the et design - Copy page.
complete_sql: SELECT start_time,end_time FROM sessions WHERE status=1 AND office_id=".$_OFFICE_ID." ORDER BY id ASC

description: Retrieves data from subjects for the et design - Copy page.
complete_sql: SELECT id,subject_name FROM subjects WHERE status=1 AND office_id=".$_OFFICE_ID." ORDER BY id ASC

description: Retrieves data from users, designations for the et design - Copy page.
complete_sql: SELECT u.id, u.name,u.s_name, u.desi_id,d.desi_name, d.desi_code FROM users u LEFT JOIN designations d ON u.desi_id = d.id WHERE u.status = 1 AND d.desi_type=0 AND d.officer=1

description: Retrieves data from class_rooms for the et design - Copy page.
complete_sql: SELECT * FROM class_rooms WHERE status=1 AND office_id=

description: Retrieves data from users, designations for the et design page.
complete_sql: SELECT u.id, u.s_name,u.name,u.s_name, u.desi_id,d.desi_name, d.desi_code FROM users u LEFT JOIN designations d ON u.desi_id = d.id WHERE u.status = 1 AND d.desi_type=0 AND d.officer=1

description: Retrieves data from cs_designs for the example func page.
complete_sql: SELECT sub_id FROM cs_designs WHERE status = 1 AND cs_id=:ct_id

description: Retrieves data from holidays for the example func page.
complete_sql: SELECT holiday_date FROM holidays WHERE status = 1 AND holiday_date =:dates AND office_id=:office_id

description: Retrieves data from sub_designs for the example func page.
complete_sql: SELECT * FROM sub_designs WHERE status = 1 AND sub_id IN ($sub_id_string) AND office_id =$office_id ORDER BY topics_sort

description: Retrieves data from sessions for the example func page.
complete_sql: SELECT id, start_time, end_time, TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, start_time, end_time) AS duration FROM sessions WHERE status = 1 AND office_id = $office_id ORDER BY session ASC

description: Retrieves data from subjects, exam_design, courses for the exam design - Copy page.
complete_sql: SELECT cd.*, s.subject_name as subject_type_title , s.total_mark , s.weightage FROM exam_design cd LEFT JOIN subjects s ON s.id = cd.subject_id LEFT JOIN courses cs ON cs.id = cd.cs_id WHERE cd.cs_id =:cs_id AND cd.status = 1 AND s.status=1 AND cd.office_id=".$_OFFICE_ID." ORDER BY cd.type_sort ASC

description: Retrieves data from exam_design for the exam design - Copy page.
complete_sql: SELECT max(type_sort) as SORT FROM exam_design WHERE cs_id = :cs_id AND office_id=".$_OFFICE_ID

description: Retrieves data from subjects for the exam design - Copy page.
complete_sql: SELECT * FROM subjects WHERE id= :subject_id

description: Retrieves data from exam_design for the exam design - Copy page.
complete_sql: SELECT * FROM exam_design WHERE cs_id = :cs_id

description: Retrieves data from courses for the exam failure design page.
complete_sql: SELECT * FROM courses where status=1 AND office_id=".$_OFFICE_ID." ORDER BY cs_code ASC

description: Retrieves data from courses, exam_failure_design for the exam failure design page.
complete_sql: SELECT * FROM courses where status=1 AND id NOT IN (SELECT cs_id FROM exam_failure_design WHERE status=1 AND office_id =$_OFFICE_ID) AND office_id=".$_OFFICE_ID." ORDER BY cs_code ASC

description: Retrieves data from exam_type, exam_failure_design for the exam failure design page.
complete_sql: SELECT * FROM exam_type where status=1 AND id NOT IN (SELECT exam_type_id FROM exam_failure_design WHERE status=1 AND cs_id =$cs_id AND office_id =$_OFFICE_ID) ORDER BY title ASC

description: Retrieves data from exam_type, courses, exam_failure_design for the exam failure design page.
complete_sql: SELECT cd.*, et.title as exam_type_title ,et.title_hindi as exam_type_title_hindi, et.total_mark , et.weightage FROM exam_failure_design cd LEFT JOIN exam_type et ON et.id = cd.exam_type_id LEFT JOIN courses cs ON cs.id = cd.cs_id WHERE cd.cs_id =:cs_id AND cd.status = 1 AND et.status=1 AND cd.office_id=".$_OFFICE_ID." ORDER BY cd.type_sort ASC

description: Retrieves data from exam_failure_design for the exam failure design page.
complete_sql: SELECT max(type_sort) as SORT FROM exam_failure_design WHERE cs_id = :cs_id AND office_id=".$_OFFICE_ID

description: Retrieves data from exam_failure_design for the exam failure design page.
complete_sql: SELECT * FROM exam_failure_design WHERE id= :exam_type_id

description: Retrieves data from exam_failure_design for the exam failure design page.
complete_sql: SELECT * FROM exam_failure_design WHERE cs_id = :cs_id

description: Retrieves data from rail_stations, exam_marks, divisions, users, rail_zones, designations for the exam failure marks page.
complete_sql: SELECT d.desi_code, di.div_code, rz.zone_code, rs.st_code, u.id, u.father_name, u.name, u.mobile, u.email FROM users u LEFT JOIN exam_marks em ON em.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN designations d ON d.id = u.desi_id LEFT JOIN divisions di ON di.id = u.div_id LEFT JOIN rail_zones rz ON rz.id = u.zone_id LEFT JOIN rail_stations rs ON rs.id = u.station_id WHERE em.course_id = :course_id AND em.result = 2 AND u.status = 1 AND u.role_id = 1 AND u.office_id = ".$_OFFICE_ID." ORDER BY u.name ASC

description: Retrieves data from exam_design, exam_type, training_calendars for the exam failure marks page.
complete_sql: SELECT ed.id AS design_id,ed.cs_id AS course_id,ed.exam_type_id AS exam_type_id,et.title,et.total_mark AS max_mark,et.weightage AS weightage, tc.id AS calendar_id FROM exam_design ed JOIN training_calendars tc ON tc.ct_id = ed.cs_id JOIN exam_type et ON et.id = ed.exam_type_id WHERE ed.status = 1 AND tc.id =

description: Retrieves data from exam_type, training_calendars, exam_failure_design for the exam failure marks page.
complete_sql: SELECT ed.id AS design_id,ed.cs_id AS course_id,ed.exam_type_id AS exam_type_id,et.title,et.total_mark AS max_mark,et.weightage AS weightage, tc.id AS calendar_id FROM exam_failure_design ed JOIN training_calendars tc ON tc.ct_id = ed.cs_id JOIN exam_type et ON et.id = ed.exam_type_id WHERE ed.status = 1 AND tc.id =

description: Retrieves data from rail_stations, divisions, users, rail_zones, designations, tra_masters for the exam marks 13092025failpass page.
complete_sql: SELECT d.desi_code,di.div_code,rz.zone_code,rs.st_code,tm.course_id, tm.user_id AS id,u.father_name,u.name, u.mobile, u.email FROM tra_masters tm LEFT JOIN users u ON u.id = tm.user_id LEFT JOIN designations d ON d.id = tm.desi_id LEFT JOIN divisions as di ON di.id=tm.div_id LEFT JOIN rail_zones as rz ON rz.id=tm.zone_id LEFT JOIN rail_stations as rs ON rs.id=tm.station_id WHERE rtm.course_id IN (".$_SESSION['curent']['course_id'].") AND tm.status = 1 AND u.role_id = 1 AND tm.is_approved=1 AND tm.office_id = ".$_OFFICE_ID." $zoneCondition ORDER BY rz.zone_code, di.div_code, rs.st_code

description: Retrieves data from rail_stations, divisions, users, rail_zones, designations, tra_masters for the exam marks 13092025failpass page.
complete_sql: SELECT d.desi_code,di.div_code,rz.zone_code,rs.st_code,tm.course_id, tm.user_id AS id,u.father_name,u.name, u.mobile, u.email FROM tra_masters tm LEFT JOIN users u ON u.id = tm.user_id LEFT JOIN designations d ON d.id = tm.desi_id LEFT JOIN divisions as di ON di.id=tm.div_id LEFT JOIN rail_zones as rz ON rz.id=tm.zone_id LEFT JOIN rail_stations as rs ON rs.id=tm.station_id WHERE tm.course_id IN (".$_SESSION['current']['course_id'].") AND tm.status = 1 AND u.role_id = 1 AND tm.is_approved=1 AND tm.office_id = ".$_OFFICE_ID." $zoneCondition ORDER BY rz.zone_code, di.div_code, rs.st_code

description: Retrieves data from et_design, exam_marks, training_calendars, users, subjects, tra_masters for the exam marks 13092025failpass page.
complete_sql: SELECT ed.id AS design_id, ed.course_id, ed.subject AS subject_id, ed.exam_date, s.subject_name AS title, s.total_mark AS max_mark, s.weightage AS weightage, tc.fail_status, tc.extended_date, tc.id AS calendar_id,tm.id AS tmid, u.name,em.mark_obtained,u.id as user_id FROM et_design ed JOIN training_calendars tc ON tc.id = ed.course_id JOIN subjects s ON s.id = ed.subject JOIN tra_masters tm ON tm.course_id=ed.course_id JOIN users u ON u.id=tm.user_id LEFT JOIN exam_marks em ON em.user_id=tm.user_id AND em.course_id=tm.course_id AND em.subject_id=ed.subject WHERE ed.status = 1 AND (tc.from_date, tc.to_date, tc.cf_id, tc.ct_id) = ( SELECT t2.from_date, t2.to_date, t2.cf_id, t2.ct_id FROM training_calendars t2 WHERE t2.id IN(376) ) ORDER BY ed.id, ed.subject

description: Retrieves data from mdl_course for the generated paper page.
complete_sql: SELECT id AS course_id, fullname AS course_name,shortname,idnumber,CAST(LEFT(idnumber, LENGTH(idnumber) - 6) AS UNSIGNED) AS ct_id,startdate,enddate FROM mdl_course ORDER BY fullname

description: Retrieves data from mdl_quiz_slots, mdl_question_answers, mdl_question_references, mdl_question, mdl_quiz, mdl_question_versions for the generated paper page.
complete_sql: SELECT qm.*, qs.slot AS slot_no,q.id AS question_id,q.qtype ,q.questiontext,CAST(qs.maxmark AS UNSIGNED) AS maxmark, MAX(CASE WHEN qa.opt_num = 1 THEN qa.answer END) AS option_A, MAX(CASE WHEN qa.opt_num = 2 THEN qa.answer END) AS option_B, MAX(CASE WHEN qa.opt_num = 3 THEN qa.answer END) AS option_C, MAX(CASE WHEN qa.opt_num = 4 THEN qa.answer END) AS option_D, GROUP_CONCAT(CASE WHEN qa.id IS NOT NULL THEN qa.answer END ORDER BY qa.id SEPARATOR ' | ') AS options FROM mdl_quiz_slots qs JOIN mdl_quiz qm ON qm.id = qs.quizid AND qm.course = ".$course_id." INNER JOIN mdl_question_references qr ON qr.itemid = qs.id AND qr.component = 'mod_quiz' AND qr.questionarea = 'slot' INNER JOIN mdl_question_versions qv ON qv.questionbankentryid = qr.questionbankentryid AND (qv.version = qr.version OR qr.version IS NULL) INNER JOIN mdl_question q ON q.id = qv.questionid AND q.parent = 0 LEFT JOIN (SELECT qa.*, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY qa.question ORDER BY qa.id) AS opt_num FROM mdl_question_answers qa) qa ON qa.question = q.id WHERE qs.quizid = ".$quiz_id." GROUP BY qs.slot,q.id, q.qtype, q.questiontext ORDER BY CASE WHEN q.qtype = 'multichoice' THEN 1 WHEN q.qtype = 'essay' THEN 2 ELSE 3 END, qs.slot

description: Retrieves data from mdl_quiz_slots, mdl_question_answers, mdl_question_references, mdl_question, mdl_quiz, mdl_question_versions for the generated paper page.
complete_sql: SELECT qm.*,qs.quizid,q.id AS question_id, q.questiontext,q.defaultmark,CAST(qs.maxmark AS UNSIGNED) AS maxmark,q.qtype, // MAX(CASE WHEN qa.opt_num = 1 THEN qa.answer END) AS option_A, // MAX(CASE WHEN qa.opt_num = 2 THEN qa.answer END) AS option_B, // MAX(CASE WHEN qa.opt_num = 3 THEN qa.answer END) AS option_C, // MAX(CASE WHEN qa.opt_num = 4 THEN qa.answer END) AS option_D FROM mdl_quiz_slots qs // JOIN mdl_quiz qm ON qm.id = qs.quizid AND qm.course = ".$course_id." // JOIN mdl_question_references qr ON qr.itemid = qs.id // JOIN mdl_question_versions qv ON qv.questionbankentryid = qr.questionbankentryid AND qv.version = qr.version // JOIN mdl_question q ON q.id = qv.questionid // LEFT JOIN (SELECT qa.*, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY qa.question ORDER BY qa.id) AS opt_num FROM mdl_question_answers qa) qa ON qa.question = q.id WHERE qs.quizid = ".$quiz_id." group by q.id ORDER BY CASE WHEN q.qtype = 'multichoice' THEN 1 WHEN q.qtype = 'essay' THEN 2 ELSE 3 END,qs.slot, qa.id

description: Retrieves data from mdl_quiz_slots, mdl_question_answers, mdl_question_references, mdl_question_bank_entries, mdl_question, mdl_quiz, mdl_tag_instance, mdl_question_versions for the generated paper page.
complete_sql: SELECT qm.*, qs.slot AS slot_no,q.id AS question_id,q.qtype ,q.questiontext,CAST(qs.maxmark AS UNSIGNED) AS maxmark,qbe.questioncategoryid,ti.tagid, MAX(CASE WHEN qa.opt_num = 1 THEN qa.answer END) AS option_A, MAX(CASE WHEN qa.opt_num = 2 THEN qa.answer END) AS option_B, MAX(CASE WHEN qa.opt_num = 3 THEN qa.answer END) AS option_C, MAX(CASE WHEN qa.opt_num = 4 THEN qa.answer END) AS option_D, GROUP_CONCAT(CASE WHEN qa.id IS NOT NULL THEN qa.answer END ORDER BY qa.id SEPARATOR ' | ') AS options FROM mdl_quiz_slots qs JOIN mdl_quiz qm ON qm.id = qs.quizid AND qm.course = ".$course_id." INNER JOIN mdl_question_references qr ON qr.itemid = qs.id AND qr.component = 'mod_quiz' AND qr.questionarea = 'slot' INNER JOIN mdl_question_versions qv ON qv.questionbankentryid = qr.questionbankentryid AND (qv.version = qr.version OR qr.version IS NULL) INNER JOIN mdl_question_bank_entries qbe ON qbe.id = qv.questionbankentryid INNER JOIN mdl_question q ON q.id = qv.questionid AND q.parent = 0 LEFT JOIN mdl_tag_instance ti ON ti.itemid = q.id AND ti.itemtype = 'question' LEFT JOIN (SELECT qa.*, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY qa.question ORDER BY qa.id) AS opt_num FROM mdl_question_answers qa) qa ON qa.question = q.id WHERE qs.quizid = ".$quiz_id." GROUP BY qs.slot,q.id, q.qtype, q.questiontext ORDER BY CASE WHEN q.qtype = 'multichoice' THEN 1 WHEN q.qtype = 'essay' THEN 2 ELSE 3 END, qs.slot

description: Retrieves data from mdl_question_answers, mdl_question, mdl_question_bank_entries, mdl_tag_instance, mdl_question_versions for the generated paper page.
complete_sql: SELECT q.id AS question_id, q.questiontext, q.qtype,q.defaultmark, qbe.questioncategoryid, ti.tagid, MAX(CASE WHEN qa.opt_num = 1 THEN qa.answer END) AS option_A, MAX(CASE WHEN qa.opt_num = 2 THEN qa.answer END) AS option_B, MAX(CASE WHEN qa.opt_num = 3 THEN qa.answer END) AS option_C, MAX(CASE WHEN qa.opt_num = 4 THEN qa.answer END) AS option_D FROM mdl_question q INNER JOIN mdl_question_versions qv ON qv.questionid = q.id INNER JOIN mdl_question_bank_entries qbe ON qbe.id = qv.questionbankentryid LEFT JOIN mdl_tag_instance ti ON ti.itemid = q.id AND ti.itemtype = 'question' LEFT JOIN ( SELECT qa.*, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY qa.question ORDER BY qa.id) AS opt_num FROM mdl_question_answers qa ) qa ON qa.question = q.id WHERE q.id IN (" . $ids_str . ") AND q.qtype = '" . $question_type . "' AND q.parent = 0 AND qv.version = ( SELECT MAX(qv2.version) FROM mdl_question_versions qv2 WHERE qv2.questionbankentryid = qv.questionbankentryid ) GROUP BY q.id

description: Retrieves data from mdl_question_answers, mdl_question, mdl_question_bank_entries, mdl_tag, mdl_question_versions, mdl_question_tags for the generate paper - Copy page.
complete_sql: SELECT q.id AS question_id, q.name AS question_name, q.questiontext,q.qtype, // MAX(CASE WHEN opt_num = 1 THEN qa.answer END) AS option_A, // MAX(CASE WHEN opt_num = 2 THEN qa.answer END) AS option_B, // MAX(CASE WHEN opt_num = 3 THEN qa.answer END) AS option_C, // MAX(CASE WHEN opt_num = 4 THEN qa.answer END) AS option_D // FROM mdl_question q // JOIN mdl_question_versions qv ON qv.questionid = q.id // JOIN mdl_question_bank_entries qbe ON qbe.id = qv.questionbankentryid // JOIN mdl_question_tags qt ON qt.questionid = q.id // JOIN mdl_tag tag ON tag.id = qt.tagid // JOIN (SELECT qa.*, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY qa.question ORDER BY qa.id) AS opt_num // FROM mdl_question_answers qa) qa ON qa.question = q.id // WHERE FIND_IN_SET(qbe.questioncategoryid, :category_ids) // AND q.qtype = :qtype // AND q.parent = 0 // AND tag.id = :tag_id // AND qv.version = (SELECT MAX(qv2.version) FROM mdl_question_versions qv2 WHERE qv2.questionbankentryid = qv.questionbankentryid) // GROUP BY q.id // ORDER BY RAND() // LIMIT :limit

description: Retrieves data from mdl_question, mdl_question_answers, mdl_question_versions, mdl_question_bank_entries for the generate paper - Copy page.
complete_sql: SELECT q.id AS question_id,q.name AS question_name, q.questiontext, // // MAX(CASE WHEN opt_num = 1 THEN qa.answer END) AS option_A, // // MAX(CASE WHEN opt_num = 2 THEN qa.answer END) AS option_B, // // MAX(CASE WHEN opt_num = 3 THEN qa.answer END) AS option_C, // // MAX(CASE WHEN opt_num = 4 THEN qa.answer END) AS option_D FROM mdl_question q // // JOIN mdl_question_versions qv ON qv.questionid = q.id // // JOIN mdl_question_bank_entries qbe ON qbe.id = qv.questionbankentryid // // JOIN (SELECT qa.*, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY qa.question ORDER BY qa.id) AS opt_num FROM mdl_question_answers qa) qa ON qa.question = q.id // // WHERE FIND_IN_SET(qbe.questioncategoryid, '21,23') AND q.qtype = 'multichoice' AND q.parent = 0 // // AND qv.version = (SELECT MAX(qv2.version) FROM mdl_question_versions qv2 WHERE qv2.questionbankentryid = qv.questionbankentryid) // // GROUP BY q.id ORDER BY RAND()LIMIT

description: Retrieves data from subjects, cbt_blue_prints for the generate paper - Copy page.
complete_sql: SELECT cbp.*,s.subject_name FROM cbt_blue_prints cbp LEFT JOIN subjects AS s ON s.id=cbp.subject_id WHERE cbp.exam_id= :exam_id AND cbp.status=1 ORDER BY cbp.id DESC

description: Retrieves data from mdl_question_answers, mdl_question, mdl_question_bank_entries, mdl_tag, mdl_tag_instance, mdl_question_versions for the generate paper - Copy page.
complete_sql: SELECT q.id AS question_id, q.name AS question_name, q.questiontext, q.qtype, qbe.questioncategoryid, ti.tagid, MAX(CASE WHEN qa.opt_num = 1 THEN qa.answer END) AS option_A, MAX(CASE WHEN qa.opt_num = 2 THEN qa.answer END) AS option_B, MAX(CASE WHEN qa.opt_num = 3 THEN qa.answer END) AS option_C, MAX(CASE WHEN qa.opt_num = 4 THEN qa.answer END) AS option_D FROM mdl_question q INNER JOIN mdl_question_versions qv ON qv.questionid = q.id INNER JOIN mdl_question_bank_entries qbe ON qbe.id = qv.questionbankentryid LEFT JOIN mdl_tag_instance ti ON ti.itemid = q.id AND ti.itemtype = 'question' LEFT JOIN mdl_tag tag ON tag.id = ti.tagid LEFT JOIN ( SELECT qa.*, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY qa.question ORDER BY qa.id) AS opt_num FROM mdl_question_answers qa ) qa ON qa.question = q.id WHERE FIND_IN_SET(qbe.questioncategoryid, :category_ids) AND q.qtype = :qtype AND q.parent = 0 AND tag.id = :tag_id AND qv.version = (SELECT MAX(qv2.version) FROM mdl_question_versions qv2 WHERE qv2.questionbankentryid = qv.questionbankentryid) GROUP BY q.id ORDER BY RAND() LIMIT " . (int)$num_questions

description: Retrieves data from mdl_quiz_slots, mdl_question_references, mdl_question_bank_entries, mdl_question, mdl_question_versions, mdl_question_categories for the generate paper230426 page.
complete_sql: SELECT qs.slot, q.id AS question_id, q.name, q.qtype, q.questiontext, q.defaultmark, qc.name AS category_name FROM mdl_quiz_slots qs JOIN mdl_question_references qr ON qr.itemid = qs.id AND qr.component = 'mod_quiz' AND qr.questionarea = 'slot' JOIN mdl_question_bank_entries qbe ON qbe.id = qr.questionbankentryid JOIN mdl_question_versions qv ON qv.questionbankentryid = qbe.id AND qv.version = qr.version JOIN mdl_question q ON q.id = qv.questionid JOIN mdl_question_categories qc ON qc.id = qbe.questioncategoryid WHERE qs.quizid = ".$data['quizid']." ORDER BY qs.slot ASC

complete_sql: SELECT tm.id,tm.course_id, tm.out_stay, tm.application_id, tm.user_id, us.name, us.father_name, z.zone_code, rs.st_code, d.div_code, tc.batch_no, tc.course_code, tc.program_name, tc.to_date, r.role_name FROM tra_masters tm JOIN users us ON us.id = tm.user_id LEFT JOIN training_calendars tc ON tc.id = tm.course_id LEFT JOIN divisions d ON d.id = tm.div_id LEFT JOIN rail_zones z ON z.id = tm.zone_id LEFT JOIN rail_stations rs ON rs.id = tm.station_id LEFT JOIN roles r ON r.id = tm.role WHERE tm.status = '1' AND tm.out_stay = 1 $whrs ORDER BY us.name ASC

description: Retrieves data from training_calendars, users, item_prices, bill_receipts, tra_masters for the mess receipt add - Copy page.
complete_sql: SELECT u.name, tm.is_approved_date, u.id As user_id, tc.id AS course_id, tc.program_name, tc.course_code, tc.from_date, tc.to_date, DATEDIFF(tc.to_date, tc.from_date) + 1 AS total_days, ipm.price, br.amount, br.receipt_date,br.receipt_no,br.pay_by,br.id AS receipt_id,br.price as final_price, ( SELECT SUM(br2.amount) FROM bill_receipts br2 WHERE br2.user_id = br.user_id AND br2.course_id = br.course_id AND br2.status=1) AS total_amount FROM tra_masters tm LEFT JOIN training_calendars AS tc ON tc.id = tm.course_id LEFT JOIN users AS u ON u.id = tm.user_id LEFT JOIN bill_receipts AS br ON br.course_id = tm.course_id AND br.user_id = tm.user_id AND br.status=1 LEFT JOIN item_prices AS ipm ON ipm.item_id = 4 AND ipm.effect_date = ( SELECT MAX(ip2.effect_date) FROM item_prices ip2 WHERE ip2.item_id = 4 AND ip2.effect_date <= tc.from_date ) WHERE tm.is_approved = 1 AND tm.user_id=$user_id AND tm.course_id=$course_id AND tm.status = 1

description: Retrieves data from training_calendars, users, item_prices, bill_receipts, tra_masters for the mess receipt add page.
complete_sql: SELECT u.name, tm.is_approved_date, u.id As user_id, tc.id AS course_id, tc.program_name, tc.course_code, tc.from_date, tc.to_date, tc.extended_date, tc.fail_status,br.overhead, -- DATEDIFF(tc.to_date, tm.is_approved_date) + 1 AS total_days, CASE WHEN tc.fail_status IN (1,2) AND tc.extended_date IS NOT NULL AND tc.extended_date > tc.to_date THEN (DATEDIFF(tc.extended_date +1, tc.to_date + 1)) ELSE DATEDIFF(tc.to_date, tm.is_approved_date) + 1 END AS total_days, ipm.price, br.amount, br.receipt_date, br.receipt_no, br.pay_by,br.user_name, br.id AS receipt_id, br.price as final_price, ( SELECT SUM(br2.amount) FROM bill_receipts br2 WHERE br2.user_id = br.user_id AND br2.course_id = br.course_id AND br2.status=1) AS total_amount FROM tra_masters tm LEFT JOIN training_calendars AS tc ON tc.id = tm.course_id LEFT JOIN users AS u ON u.id = tm.user_id LEFT JOIN bill_receipts AS br ON br.course_id = tm.course_id AND br.user_id = tm.user_id AND br.status=1 LEFT JOIN item_prices AS ipm ON ipm.item_id = 4 AND ipm.effect_date = (SELECT MAX(ip2.effect_date) FROM item_prices ip2 WHERE ip2.item_id = 4 AND ip2.effect_date <= tc.from_date) WHERE tm.is_approved = 1 AND tm.user_id=$user_id AND tm.course_id=$course_id AND tm.status = 1

description: Retrieves data from training_calendars, users, item_prices, bill_receipts, tra_masters for the mess receipt list page.
complete_sql: SELECT u.name, tm.is_approved_date, br.user_id, br.course_id, tc.program_name, tc.course_code, tc.from_date, tc.to_date, DATEDIFF(tc.to_date, tc.from_date) + 1 AS total_days, ipm.price, br.amount, br.receipt_date,br.receipt_no,br.pay_by,br.id AS receipt_id, ( SELECT SUM(br2.amount) FROM bill_receipts br2 WHERE br2.user_id = br.user_id AND br2.course_id = br.course_id AND br2.status=1) AS total_amount FROM tra_masters tm LEFT JOIN training_calendars AS tc ON tc.id = tm.course_id LEFT JOIN users AS u ON u.id = tm.user_id LEFT JOIN bill_receipts AS br ON br.course_id = tm.course_id AND br.user_id = tm.user_id AND br.status=1 LEFT JOIN item_prices AS ipm ON ipm.item_id = 4 AND ipm.effect_date = ( SELECT MAX(ip2.effect_date) FROM item_prices ip2 WHERE ip2.item_id = 4 AND ip2.effect_date <= tc.from_date ) WHERE tm.course_id IN ($course_id) AND tm.is_approved = 1 AND tm.status = 1

description: Retrieves data from training_calendars, users, item_prices, bill_receipts, tra_masters for the mess receipt list page.
complete_sql: SELECT u.name, tm.is_approved_date, br.user_id, br.course_id, tc.program_name, tc.course_code, tc.from_date, tc.to_date, DATEDIFF(tc.to_date, tc.from_date) + 1 AS total_days, ipm.price,br.amount,br.receipt_date,br.receipt_no,br.pay_by,br.id AS receipt_id, ( SELECT SUM(br2.amount) FROM bill_receipts br2 WHERE br2.user_id = br.user_id AND br2.course_id = br.course_id AND br2.status=1) AS total_amount FROM tra_masters tm LEFT JOIN training_calendars AS tc ON tc.id = tm.course_id LEFT JOIN users AS u ON u.id = tm.user_id LEFT JOIN bill_receipts AS br ON br.course_id = tm.course_id AND br.user_id = tm.user_id AND br.status=1 LEFT JOIN item_prices AS ipm ON ipm.item_id = 4 AND ipm.effect_date = ( SELECT MAX(ip2.effect_date) FROM item_prices ip2 WHERE ip2.item_id = 4 AND ip2.effect_date <= tc.from_date ) WHERE tm.course_id IN ($course_id) AND tm.is_approved = 1 AND tm.status = 1

description: Retrieves data from training_calendars, users, item_prices, bill_receipts, tra_masters for the mess receipt list page.
complete_sql: SELECT u.name, tm.is_approved_date, u.id AS user_id, tc.id AS course_id, tc.program_name, tc.course_code, tc.from_date, tc.to_date, -- DATEDIFF(tc.to_date, tm.is_approved_date) + 1 AS total_days, CASE WHEN tc.fail_status IN (1,2) AND tc.extended_date IS NOT NULL AND tc.extended_date > tc.to_date THEN (DATEDIFF(tc.extended_date+1,tc.to_date + 1)) ELSE DATEDIFF(tc.to_date, tm.is_approved_date) + 1 END AS total_days, ipm.price, br.amount, br.receipt_date, br.receipt_no, br.pay_by, br.id AS receipt_id, br.price as final_price, (SELECT SUM(br2.amount) FROM bill_receipts br2 WHERE br2.user_id = br.user_id AND br2.course_id = br.course_id AND br2.status=1) AS total_amount FROM tra_masters tm LEFT JOIN training_calendars AS tc ON tc.id = tm.course_id LEFT JOIN users AS u ON u.id = tm.user_id LEFT JOIN bill_receipts AS br ON br.course_id = tm.course_id AND br.user_id = tm.user_id AND br.status=1 LEFT JOIN item_prices AS ipm ON ipm.item_id = 4 AND ipm.effect_date = (SELECT MAX(ip2.effect_date) FROM item_prices ip2 WHERE ip2.item_id = 4 AND ip2.effect_date <= tc.from_date) WHERE tm.is_approved = 1 AND tm.status = 1 $whr UNION ALL SELECT br.user_name AS name, NULL AS is_approved_date, NULL AS user_id, NULL AS course_id, NULL AS program_name, NULL AS course_code, br.from_date, br.to_date, DATEDIFF(br.to_date, br.from_date) + 1 AS total_days, br.price, br.amount, br.receipt_date, br.receipt_no, br.pay_by, br.id AS receipt_id, br.price as final_price, br.amount AS total_amount FROM bill_receipts br WHERE br.status=1 AND (br.user_id IS NULL OR br.user_id=0) AND (br.course_id IS NULL OR br.course_id=0) $whrsm ORDER BY date(receipt_date) DESC

description: Retrieves data from training_calendars, users, item_prices, bill_receipts, tra_masters for the mess receipt list page.
complete_sql: SELECT u.name,br.user_name,tm.is_approved_date, u.id As user_id, tm.id as tra_id,tm.local_trainee,tc.id AS course_id, tc.program_name, tc.course_code, tc.from_date, tc.to_date, -- DATEDIFF(tc.to_date, tm.is_approved_date) + 1 AS total_days, CASE WHEN tc.fail_status IN (1,2) AND tc.extended_date IS NOT NULL AND tc.extended_date > tc.to_date THEN (DATEDIFF(tc.extended_date+1,tc.to_date + 1)) ELSE DATEDIFF(tc.to_date, tm.is_approved_date) + 1 END AS total_days, ipm.price, br.amount, br.receipt_date,br.receipt_no,br.pay_by,br.id AS receipt_id,br.price as final_price, ( SELECT SUM(br2.amount) FROM bill_receipts br2 WHERE br2.user_id = br.user_id AND br2.course_id = br.course_id AND br2.status=1) AS total_amount FROM tra_masters tm LEFT JOIN training_calendars AS tc ON tc.id = tm.course_id LEFT JOIN users AS u ON u.id = tm.user_id LEFT JOIN bill_receipts AS br ON br.course_id = tm.course_id AND br.user_id = tm.user_id AND br.status=1 LEFT JOIN item_prices AS ipm ON ipm.item_id = 4 AND ipm.effect_date = ( SELECT MAX(ip2.effect_date) FROM item_prices ip2 WHERE ip2.item_id = 4 AND ip2.effect_date <= tc.from_date ) WHERE tm.is_approved = 1 $whr AND tm.status = 1 ORDER BY date(br.receipt_date) DESC

description: Retrieves data from meeting_create, users, designations for the mom edit page.
complete_sql: SELECT mc.id AS meeting_id,mc.*,(SELECT u.name FROM users u WHERE u.id = mc.created_by) AS created_by_name, (SELECT u.mobile FROM users u WHERE u.id = mc.created_by) AS created_by_mobile, (SELECT d.desi_code FROM designations d JOIN users u ON u.desi_id = d.id WHERE u.id = mc.created_by) AS created_by_desi, (SELECT u.name FROM users u WHERE u.id = mc.creator) AS creator_name, (SELECT d.desi_code FROM designations d JOIN users u ON u.desi_id = d.id WHERE u.id = mc.creator) AS creator_desi, (SELECT u.name FROM users u WHERE u.id = mc.chairman) AS chairman_name, (SELECT d.desi_code FROM designations d JOIN users u ON u.desi_id = d.id WHERE u.id = mc.chairman) AS chairman_desi FROM meeting_create mc WHERE mc.status = 1 AND mc.id= :id ORDER BY mc.id ASC

description: Retrieves data from mdl_question_answers, mdl_question, mdl_question_bank_entries, mdl_question_versions, mdl_question_categories for the questions list page.
complete_sql: SELECT mq.id,mq.name as q_name,mq.questiontext as q_text, CAST(mq.defaultmark AS UNSIGNED) as defaultmark,mq.qtype,mqc.name,GROUP_CONCAT(mqa.answer ORDER BY mqa.id SEPARATOR '||') as all_answers, GROUP_CONCAT(mqa.fraction ORDER BY mqa.id SEPARATOR '||') as all_fractions FROM mdl_question mq LEFT JOIN mdl_question_versions AS mqv ON mqv.questionid = mq.id LEFT JOIN mdl_question_bank_entries AS mbe ON mbe.id = mqv.questionbankentryid LEFT JOIN mdl_question_categories AS mqc ON mqc.id = mbe.questioncategoryid LEFT JOIN mdl_question_answers mqa ON mqa.question = mq.id WHERE $where $wherqm group by mq.id ORDER BY mq.id ASC

description: Retrieves data from mdl_question_answers, mdl_question, mdl_question_bank_entries, mdl_question_versions, mdl_question_categories for the questions list page.
complete_sql: SELECT mq.id,mq.name as q_name,mq.qtype,mq.questiontext as q_text, CAST(mq.defaultmark AS UNSIGNED) as defaultmark, mqc.name,GROUP_CONCAT(mqa.answer ORDER BY mqa.id SEPARATOR '||') as all_answers, GROUP_CONCAT(mqa.fraction ORDER BY mqa.id SEPARATOR '||') as all_fractions FROM mdl_question mq LEFT JOIN mdl_question_versions AS mqv ON mqv.questionid = mq.id LEFT JOIN mdl_question_bank_entries AS mbe ON mbe.id = mqv.questionbankentryid LEFT JOIN mdl_question_categories AS mqc ON mqc.id = mbe.questioncategoryid LEFT JOIN mdl_question_answers mqa ON mqa.question = mq.id WHERE $where $wherqm group by mq.id ORDER BY mq.id ASC

description: Retrieves data from mdl_question, mdl_question_bank_entries, mdl_tag, mdl_tag_instance, mdl_question_versions for the question descriptive page.
complete_sql: SELECT mq.id,mq.name as p_qname, mq.questiontext as p_qtext,mq.defaultmark as p_defaultmark, mbe.questioncategoryid as p_categoryid,GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT mt.name) as p_tag FROM mdl_question mq LEFT JOIN mdl_question_versions mqv ON mqv.questionid = mq.id LEFT JOIN mdl_question_bank_entries mbe ON mbe.id = mqv.questionbankentryid LEFT JOIN mdl_tag_instance mti ON mti.itemid = mq.id LEFT JOIN mdl_tag mt ON mt.id = mti.tagid WHERE mq.id = :id GROUP BY mq.id

description: Retrieves data from mdl_question_answers, mdl_question, mdl_question_bank_entries, mdl_tag, mdl_tag_instance, mdl_question_versions for the question edit page.
complete_sql: SELECT mq.id, mq.name as p_qname,mq.questiontext as p_qtext,mq.defaultmark as p_defaultmark, mbe.questioncategoryid as p_categoryid,GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT mt.name) as p_tags,MAX(CASE WHEN mqa.fraction = 1.0000000 THEN mqa.answer END) as correct_answer_text,MAX(CASE WHEN mqa.fraction = 1.0000000 THEN CASE WHEN mqa.id = (SELECT MIN(id) FROM mdl_question_answers WHERE question = mq.id) THEN 1 WHEN mqa.id = (SELECT id FROM mdl_question_answers WHERE question = mq.id ORDER BY id LIMIT 1 OFFSET 1) THEN 2 WHEN mqa.id = (SELECT id FROM mdl_question_answers WHERE question = mq.id ORDER BY id LIMIT 1 OFFSET 2) THEN 3 WHEN mqa.id = (SELECT id FROM mdl_question_answers WHERE question = mq.id ORDER BY id LIMIT 1 OFFSET 3) THEN 4 END END) as p_correct, MAX(CASE WHEN mqa.id = (SELECT MIN(id) FROM mdl_question_answers WHERE question = mq.id) THEN mqa.answer END) as p_opt1, MAX(CASE WHEN mqa.id = (SELECT id FROM mdl_question_answers WHERE question = mq.id ORDER BY id LIMIT 1 OFFSET 1) THEN mqa.answer END) as p_opt2, MAX(CASE WHEN mqa.id = (SELECT id FROM mdl_question_answers WHERE question = mq.id ORDER BY id LIMIT 1 OFFSET 2) THEN mqa.answer END) as p_opt3, MAX(CASE WHEN mqa.id = (SELECT id FROM mdl_question_answers WHERE question = mq.id ORDER BY id LIMIT 1 OFFSET 3) THEN mqa.answer END) as p_opt4 FROM mdl_question mq LEFT JOIN mdl_question_answers mqa ON mqa.question = mq.id LEFT JOIN mdl_question_versions mqv ON mqv.questionid = mq.id LEFT JOIN mdl_question_bank_entries mbe ON mbe.id = mqv.questionbankentryid LEFT JOIN mdl_tag_instance mti ON mti.itemid = mq.id LEFT JOIN mdl_tag mt ON mt.id = mti.tagid WHERE mq.id = :id GROUP BY mq.id

description: Retrieves data from qualification, training_calendars, users, divisions, departments, rail_zones, courses, designations, tra_masters, last_attempts for the register due monthly page.
complete_sql: SELECT * FROM (SELECT us.id AS user_id, us.ex_is_approved, us.name, rz.zone_code, c.course_name, tc.cf_id, tc.cg_id, c.cs_code, d.div_code, tc.to_date,NULL AS if_applicable,(CASE WHEN tc.cf_id IN (2,5) AND tc.cg_id = 2 THEN DATE_ADD(tc.to_date, INTERVAL 3 YEAR) - INTERVAL 1 DAY WHEN tc.cf_id = 3 AND tc.cg_id = 2 THEN DATE_ADD(tc.to_date, INTERVAL 4 YEAR) - INTERVAL 1 DAY WHEN tc.cf_id IN (7,8,9) AND tc.cg_id = 2 THEN DATE_ADD(tc.to_date, INTERVAL 5 YEAR) - INTERVAL 1 DAY ELSE NULL END) AS nextdue_date,desi.desi_code, dep.department_name, q.qualification, tm.id AS main_id, 'TM' AS source_table FROM tra_masters tm INNER JOIN (SELECT user_id, MAX(id) AS last_id FROM tra_masters GROUP BY user_id) AS x ON x.last_id = tm.id LEFT JOIN training_calendars tc ON tc.id = tm.course_id LEFT JOIN users us ON us.id = tm.user_id LEFT JOIN rail_zones rz ON rz.id = us.zone_id LEFT JOIN designations desi ON desi.id = us.desi_id LEFT JOIN departments dep ON dep.id = us.dep_id LEFT JOIN qualification q ON q.id = us.qualification LEFT JOIN divisions d ON d.id = us.div_id LEFT JOIN courses c ON c.id = tc.ct_id WHERE us.status = 1 $whrs UNION ALL SELECT us.id AS user_id, us.ex_is_approved, us.name, rz.zone_code, c.course_name, NULL AS cf_id, NULL AS cg_id, c.cs_code, d.div_code, la.to_date,la.if_applicable, la.nextdue_date, desi.desi_code, dep.department_name, q.qualification, la.id AS main_id, 'LA' AS source_table FROM last_attempts la LEFT JOIN users us ON us.id = la.user_id LEFT JOIN rail_zones rz ON rz.id = us.zone_id LEFT JOIN designations desi ON desi.id = us.desi_id LEFT JOIN departments dep ON dep.id = us.dep_id LEFT JOIN qualification q ON q.id = us.qualification LEFT JOIN divisions d ON d.id = us.div_id LEFT JOIN courses c ON c.id = la.ct_id WHERE us.status = 1 $whrs ) AS all_data " " WHERE all_data.nextdue_date IS NOT NULL AND DATE(all_data.nextdue_date) BETWEEN '$from_date' AND '$to_date' " " GROUP BY user_id ORDER BY desi_code, zone_code, div_code, department_name ASC

description: Counts records in last_attempts, tra_masters, training_calendars, users for the register nomi monthly page.
complete_sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) AS total_count FROM (SELECT us.id AS user_id, // (CASE // WHEN tc.cf_id IN (2,5) AND tc.cg_id = 2 THEN DATE_ADD(tc.to_date, INTERVAL 3 YEAR) - INTERVAL 1 DAY // WHEN tc.cf_id = 3 AND tc.cg_id = 2 THEN DATE_ADD(tc.to_date, INTERVAL 4 YEAR) - INTERVAL 1 DAY // WHEN tc.cf_id IN (7,8,9) AND tc.cg_id = 2 THEN DATE_ADD(tc.to_date, INTERVAL 5 YEAR) - INTERVAL 1 DAY // ELSE NULL // END) AS nextdue_date FROM tra_masters tm // INNER JOIN (SELECT user_id, MAX(id) AS last_id FROM tra_masters GROUP BY user_id) x ON x.last_id = tm.id // LEFT JOIN training_calendars tc ON tc.id = tm.course_id // LEFT JOIN users us ON us.id = tm.user_id WHERE us.status = 1 // UNION ALL // SELECT us.id AS user_id,la.nextdue_date FROM last_attempts la // LEFT JOIN users us ON us.id = la.user_id WHERE us.status = 1) AS all_data WHERE all_data.nextdue_date IS NOT NULL // AND all_data.nextdue_date BETWEEN '$from_date' AND '$to_date'

description: Retrieves data from seminars_topic, users, seminars for the seminar view - Copy page.
complete_sql:
SELECT s.*,vu.name AS vl_name, us.name,us.mobile, GROUP_CONCAT( DISTINCT CASE WHEN st.id = 2000 THEN CONCAT(st.sub_topic, ' - ', s.topic_des) ELSE st.sub_topic END ORDER BY st.id SEPARATOR '
') AS toic_name ,GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT u.name ORDER BY u.id SEPARATOR '
') AS judge_names,GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT ms.name ORDER BY ms.id SEPARATOR '
') AS main_speaker_names FROM seminars s LEFT JOIN seminars_topic st ON FIND_IN_SET(st.id, s.topic_id) LEFT JOIN users u ON FIND_IN_SET(u.id, s.judge) LEFT JOIN users ms ON FIND_IN_SET(ms.id, s.main_speaker) LEFT JOIN users vu ON vu.id= s.vl_id LEFT JOIN users us ON us.id = s.created_by WHERE s.status = 1 AND s.id = $id GROUP BY s.id ORDER BY s.id

description: Retrieves data from training_calendars, study_tour, users, designations for the study tour list page.
complete_sql:
SELECT st.id AS study_id,st.*, us.s_name, ds.desi_code, ds.desi_name, GROUP_CONCAT(CONCAT(tc.program_name, ' - ', tc.course_code, ' ', tc.batch_no, ' (', DATE_FORMAT(tc.from_date, '%d-%b-%y'), ' to ', DATE_FORMAT(tc.to_date, '%d-%b-%y'), ')') SEPARATOR '
') AS course_info FROM study_tour st LEFT JOIN users us ON us.id = st.staff_id LEFT JOIN designations ds ON ds.id = st.staff_desi_id LEFT JOIN training_calendars tc ON FIND_IN_SET(tc.id, st.course_id) WHERE st.status = 1 AND DATE(st.from_date) BETWEEN '$from_date' AND '$to_date' $status_filter $created_by_filter GROUP BY st.id ORDER BY DATE(st.from_date) ASC

SELECT st.id AS study_id,st.*, us.s_name, ds.desi_code, ds.desi_name, GROUP_CONCAT(CONCAT(tc.program_name, ' - ', tc.course_code, ' ', tc.batch_no, ' (', DATE_FORMAT(tc.from_date, '%d-%b-%y'), ' to ', DATE_FORMAT(tc.to_date, '%d-%b-%y'), ')') SEPARATOR '
') AS course_info FROM study_tour st LEFT JOIN users us ON us.id = st.staff_id LEFT JOIN designations ds ON ds.id = st.staff_desi_id LEFT JOIN training_calendars tc ON FIND_IN_SET(tc.id, st.course_id) WHERE st.status = 1 AND DATE(st.from_date) BETWEEN '$from_date' AND '$to_date' $created_by_filter GROUP BY st.id ORDER BY DATE(st.from_date) ASC

description: Retrieves data from training_calendars, study_tour, users, designations for the study tour view page.

SELECT st.*,u.name,u.mobile, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT us.name SEPARATOR ', ') AS staff_names, ds.desi_code, ds.desi_name, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT CONCAT(tc.program_name, ' - ', tc.course_code, ' ', tc.batch_no, ' (', DATE_FORMAT(tc.from_date, '%d-%b-%y'), ' to ', DATE_FORMAT(tc.to_date, '%d-%b-%y'), ')') SEPARATOR '
') AS course_info FROM study_tour st -- LEFT JOIN users us ON us.id = st.staff_id LEFT JOIN users us ON FIND_IN_SET(us.id, st.staff_id) LEFT JOIN users u ON u.id = st.created_by LEFT JOIN designations ds ON ds.id = st.staff_desi_id LEFT JOIN training_calendars tc ON FIND_IN_SET(tc.id, st.course_id) WHERE st.status = 1 AND st.id=".$id." GROUP BY st.id ORDER BY DATE(st.from_date) ASC

description: Retrieves data from time_masters, topics, training_calendars, users, designations for the time table calendar page.
complete_sql: SELECT tm.*, t.topic_name, ds.desi_code, dss.desi_code as sec_desi_code, dss1.desi_code as three_desi_code, dss2.desi_code as four_desi_code, dss3.desi_code as five_desi_code, tc.course_code, us.name FROM time_masters tm LEFT JOIN topics AS t ON t.id=tm.topic_id LEFT JOIN training_calendars AS tc ON tc.id=tm.course_id LEFT JOIN designations ds ON ds.id=tm.desi_id LEFT JOIN designations dss ON dss.id=tm.sec_id LEFT JOIN designations dss1 ON dss1.id=tm.desi_id_three LEFT JOIN designations dss2 ON dss2.id=tm.desi_id_four LEFT JOIN designations dss3 ON dss3.id=tm.desi_id_five LEFT JOIN users us ON us.id=tm.vl_id WHERE tm.status=1 AND tm.tm_date = '$search_date' AND tm.office_id=".$_OFFICE_ID." ORDER BY tm.id ASC

description: Retrieves data from mdl_question_answers, mdl_question, mdl_question_bank_entries, mdl_tag_instance, mdl_question_versions for the ajax load question manualcreate session page.
complete_sql: SELECT q.id AS question_id, q.questiontext, q.qtype, qbe.questioncategoryid, ti.tagid,CAST(q.defaultmark AS UNSIGNED) AS defaultmark, MAX(CASE WHEN qa.opt_num = 1 THEN qa.answer END) AS option_A, MAX(CASE WHEN qa.opt_num = 2 THEN qa.answer END) AS option_B, MAX(CASE WHEN qa.opt_num = 3 THEN qa.answer END) AS option_C, MAX(CASE WHEN qa.opt_num = 4 THEN qa.answer END) AS option_D FROM mdl_question q INNER JOIN mdl_question_versions qv ON qv.questionid = q.id INNER JOIN mdl_question_bank_entries qbe ON qbe.id = qv.questionbankentryid LEFT JOIN mdl_tag_instance ti ON ti.itemid = q.id AND ti.itemtype = 'question' LEFT JOIN ( SELECT qa.*, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY qa.question ORDER BY qa.id) AS opt_num FROM mdl_question_answers qa ) qa ON qa.question = q.id WHERE q.id IN (" . $ids_str . ") AND q.qtype = '" . $question_type . "' AND q.parent = 0 AND qv.version = ( SELECT MAX(qv2.version) FROM mdl_question_versions qv2 WHERE qv2.questionbankentryid = qv.questionbankentryid ) GROUP BY q.id

description: Retrieves data from rail_stations, divisions, users, rail_zones, designations, tra_masters for the addmission count report - Copy (2) page.
complete_sql: SELECT us.name, us.mobile, us.email, us.birth_date, d.desi_code, us.station_id, rz.zone_code, rs.st_name, rs.st_code, dv.div_code, dv.division FROM users us LEFT JOIN designations d ON d.id = us.desi_id LEFT JOIN rail_stations rs ON rs.id = us.station_id LEFT JOIN divisions dv ON dv.id = us.div_id LEFT JOIN rail_zones rz ON rz.id = us.zone_id LEFT JOIN tra_masters tm ON us.id = tm.user_id WHERE tm.course_id IN ($course_ids_str) AND tm.is_approved = 1 AND tm.status = 1 AND us.status = 1 ORDER BY rz.zone_code, dv.div_code, rs.st_code ASC

description: Retrieves data from rail_stations, divisions, users, rail_zones, designations, tra_masters for the addmission count report - Copy (2) page.
complete_sql: SELECT us.name, us.mobile, us.email, us.birth_date, d.desi_code, us.station_id, rz.zone_code, rs.st_name, rs.st_code, dv.division, dv.div_code FROM users us LEFT JOIN designations d ON d.id = us.desi_id LEFT JOIN rail_stations rs ON rs.id = us.station_id LEFT JOIN divisions dv ON dv.id = us.div_id LEFT JOIN rail_zones rz ON rz.id = us.zone_id LEFT JOIN tra_masters tm ON us.id = tm.user_id AND tm.is_approved = 1 WHERE DATE(tm.is_approved_date) = '$current_date' AND tm.course_id IN ($course_ids_str) AND tm.is_approved = 1 AND tm.status = 1 AND us.status = 1 ORDER BY rz.zone_code, dv.div_code, rs.st_code ASC

description: Retrieves data from rail_stations, divisions, users, rail_zones, designations, tra_masters for the addmission count report - Copy (2) page.
complete_sql: SELECT us.name, us.mobile, us.email, us.birth_date, d.desi_code, us.station_id, rz.zone_code, rs.st_name, rs.st_code, dv.div_code, dv.division FROM users us LEFT JOIN designations d ON d.id = us.desi_id LEFT JOIN rail_stations rs ON rs.id = us.station_id LEFT JOIN divisions dv ON dv.id = us.div_id LEFT JOIN rail_zones rz ON rz.id = us.zone_id LEFT JOIN tra_masters tm ON us.id = tm.user_id AND tm.is_approved != 2 WHERE tm.course_id IN ($course_ids_str) AND tm.is_approved != 2 AND tm.status = 1 AND us.status = 1 ORDER BY rz.zone_code, dv.div_code, rs.st_code ASC

description: Retrieves data from rail_stations, divisions, users, rail_zones, designations, tra_masters for the addmission count report - Copy page.

description: Retrieves data from rail_stations, divisions, users, hostel_masters, rail_zones, designations, tra_masters, hostel_buildings, hostel_rooms for the addmission hostel count report page.
complete_sql: SELECT us.name, us.mobile, us.email, us.birth_date, d.desi_code, us.station_id, rz.zone_code, rs.st_name, rs.st_code, dv.div_code, dv.division ,hm.id as hostel_id, hr.room_name, b.building_name, tm.out_stay FROM users us LEFT JOIN designations d ON d.id = us.desi_id LEFT JOIN rail_stations rs ON rs.id = us.station_id LEFT JOIN divisions dv ON dv.id = us.div_id LEFT JOIN rail_zones rz ON rz.id = us.zone_id LEFT JOIN tra_masters tm ON us.id = tm.user_id LEFT JOIN hostel_masters hm ON hm.user_id = us.id AND hm.course_id IN ($course_ids_str) LEFT JOIN hostel_rooms hr ON hr.id = hm.room_id LEFT JOIN hostel_buildings b ON b.id = hm.building_id WHERE tm.course_id IN ($course_ids_str) AND tm.is_approved = 1 AND tm.status = 1 AND us.status = 1 ORDER BY rz.zone_code, dv.div_code, rs.st_code ASC

description: Retrieves data from rail_stations, divisions, users, hostel_masters, rail_zones, designations, tra_masters, hostel_buildings, hostel_rooms for the addmission hostel count report page.
complete_sql: SELECT us.name, us.mobile, us.email, us.birth_date, d.desi_code, us.station_id, rz.zone_code, rs.st_name, rs.st_code, dv.div_code, dv.division , hm.id as hostel_id, hr.room_name, b.building_name, tm.out_stay FROM users us LEFT JOIN designations d ON d.id = us.desi_id LEFT JOIN rail_stations rs ON rs.id = us.station_id LEFT JOIN divisions dv ON dv.id = us.div_id LEFT JOIN rail_zones rz ON rz.id = us.zone_id LEFT JOIN tra_masters tm ON us.id = tm.user_id AND tm.is_approved != 2 LEFT JOIN hostel_masters hm ON hm.user_id = us.id AND hm.course_id IN ($course_ids_str) LEFT JOIN hostel_rooms hr ON hr.id = hm.room_id LEFT JOIN hostel_buildings b ON b.id = hm.building_id WHERE tm.course_id IN ($course_ids_str) AND tm.is_approved != 2 AND tm.status = 1 AND us.status = 1 ORDER BY rz.zone_code, dv.div_code, rs.st_code ASC

complete_sql: SELECT tm.*,us.*,d.desi_code,di.div_code,rz.zone_code,pl.g_level,pl.g_pay,rs.st_code FROM tra_masters as tm LEFT JOIN users as us ON us.id=tm.user_id LEFT JOIN designations as d ON d.id=us.desi_id LEFT JOIN divisions as di ON di.id=us.div_id LEFT JOIN rail_zones as rz ON rz.id=us.zone_id LEFT JOIN rail_stations as rs ON rs.id=us.station_id LEFT JOIN pay_level as pl ON pl.id=us.pay_level WHERE us.status=1 AND tm.is_approved = 1 $whr ORDER BY date(tm.is_approved_date),rz.zone_code, di.division, rs.st_code ASC

description: Retrieves data from training_calendars for the certificate page.

description: Retrieves data from rail_stations, divisions, users, rail_zones, designations, tra_masters for the certificate page.
complete_sql: SELECT us.name,us.name_hindi,us.father_name,us.father_name_hindi, us.mobile, us.email, us.birth_date,us.photo, d.desi_code,d.desi_name_hindi, rz.zone_code,rz.zone_name_hindi, rs.st_code, dv.div_code, tm.is_approved_date,tm.certi_ap_user,u.signature,tm.certy_no FROM users us LEFT JOIN designations d ON d.id = us.desi_id LEFT JOIN rail_zones rz ON rz.id = us.zone_id LEFT JOIN divisions dv ON dv.id = us.div_id LEFT JOIN rail_stations rs ON rs.id = us.station_id LEFT JOIN tra_masters tm ON us.id = tm.user_id LEFT JOIN users u ON u.id = tm.certi_ap_user WHERE tm.course_id IN ($course_id) AND tm.is_approved = 1 AND tm.status = 1 AND us.status = 1 AND tm.certy_no IS NOT NULL AND tm.certy_no != '' AND tm.certy_no != '0' $whr GROUP BY us.id ORDER BY us.name

description: Retrieves data from rail_stations, services, users, divisions, departments, states, rail_zones, designations, tra_masters for the certificate13092025 page.
complete_sql: SELECT us.prefix,us.name,us.photo,d.division, tm.certy_no,st.state,dp.department_name,sv.service_name,rz.zone_name,ds.desi_name,ds.desi_code, tm.div_id, rs.st_code, us.station_id FROM users us LEFT JOIN states st ON st.id = us.upsc_state LEFT JOIN departments dp ON dp.id = us.dep_id LEFT JOIN services sv ON us.service_id = sv.id LEFT JOIN rail_zones rz ON us.zone_id = rz.id LEFT JOIN rail_stations rs ON rs.id = us.station_id LEFT JOIN designations ds ON ds.id = us.desi_id LEFT JOIN divisions d ON d.id = us.div_id LEFT JOIN tra_masters tm ON tm.user_id=us.id AND tm.course_id= $course_id where us.id IN (SELECT user_id FROM tra_masters WHERE course_id = :course_id AND certy_no > 0 AND is_approved=1 AND status=1) AND us.status=1 $whr

description: Retrieves data from rail_stations, divisions, users, rail_zones, designations, tra_masters for the certificate15092025 page.
complete_sql: SELECT us.name, us.name_hindi, us.mobile, us.email, us.birth_date, d.desi_code,d.desi_name_hindi, rz.zone_code,rz.zone_name_hindi, rs.st_code, dv.div_code, tm.is_approved_date FROM users us LEFT JOIN designations d ON d.id = us.desi_id LEFT JOIN rail_zones rz ON rz.id = us.zone_id LEFT JOIN divisions dv ON dv.id = us.div_id LEFT JOIN rail_stations rs ON rs.id = us.station_id LEFT JOIN tra_masters tm ON us.id = tm.user_id WHERE tm.course_id IN ($course_id) AND tm.is_approved = 1 AND tm.status = 1 AND us.status = 1 GROUP BY us.id ORDER BY rz.zone_code, dv.div_code, rs.st_code

description: Retrieves data from rail_stations, divisions, users, rail_zones, designations, tra_masters for the certificate 191125 page.
complete_sql: SELECT us.name,us.name_hindi,us.father_name,us.father_name_hindi, us.mobile, us.email, us.birth_date,us.photo, d.desi_code,d.desi_name_hindi, rz.zone_code,rz.zone_name_hindi, rs.st_code, dv.div_code, tm.is_approved_date,tm.certi_ap_user,u.signature,tm.certy_no FROM users us LEFT JOIN designations d ON d.id = us.desi_id LEFT JOIN rail_zones rz ON rz.id = us.zone_id LEFT JOIN divisions dv ON dv.id = us.div_id LEFT JOIN rail_stations rs ON rs.id = us.station_id LEFT JOIN tra_masters tm ON us.id = tm.user_id LEFT JOIN users u ON u.id = tm.certi_ap_user WHERE tm.course_id IN ($course_id) AND tm.is_approved = 1 AND tm.status = 1 AND us.status = 1 AND tm.certy_no IS NOT NULL AND tm.certy_no != '' AND tm.certy_no != '0' $whr GROUP BY us.id ORDER BY rz.zone_code, dv.div_code, rs.st_code

complete_sql: SELECT c.*, cc.comp_name, cs.subcat_name,us.name FROM complaints c LEFT JOIN complaint_cat AS cc ON cc.id = c.ctype_id LEFT JOIN complaint_cat AS cs ON cs.id = c.ctype_sub_id LEFT JOIN users AS us ON us.id = c.user_id WHERE c.status = 1 AND c.cm_status !=6" " AND DATE(c.created_at) BETWEEN '$from_date' AND '$to_date'" " AND c.ctype_id = $ctype_id" " AND c.ctype_sub_id = $ctype_sub_id" " AND c.cm_status = $cm_status" " AND ((c.forwarded_to = 0 AND FIND_IN_SET($uid, REPLACE(cc.agent_id,' ','')) > 0)OR (c.forwarded_to = $uid))" " ORDER BY c.created_at DESC

complete_sql: SELECT ind.*,GROUP_CONCAT(u.name SEPARATOR ', ') AS faculty_names,GROUP_CONCAT(d.desi_code SEPARATOR ', ') AS faculty_codes FROM inspection_description ind LEFT JOIN users u ON FIND_IN_SET(u.id, ind.faculty_id) LEFT JOIN designations d ON u.desi_id = d.id WHERE ind.status=1 And ind.insp_id = $id GROUP BY ind.id ORDER BY ind.id ASC

description: Counts records in hostel_masters, hostel_buildings, hostel_rooms for the daily position reports page.
complete_sql: SELECT hb.id,hb.location, COALESCE(r.total_capacity, 0) AS total_capacity, COALESCE(m.occu_bed, 0) AS occu_bed, COALESCE(s.occu_beds, 0) AS occu_beds, COALESCE(mb.maintance_bed, 0) AS maintance_bed FROM hostel_buildings hb LEFT JOIN (SELECT building_id, SUM(room_beds) AS total_capacity FROM hostel_rooms WHERE status = 1 GROUP BY building_id) r ON r.building_id = hb.id LEFT JOIN (SELECT building_id, COUNT(beds) AS occu_bed FROM hostel_masters WHERE (h_status != 2 AND h_status != 4) AND plusbed=0 AND

description: Retrieves data from training_calendars, course_groups, rail_zones, course_for, courses, tra_masters for the daily position reports1 page.
complete_sql: select cf.id as cf_id, cf.course_for,cf.types as cf_types, cf.types_name,cf.sort_no, tm.user_id, tm.zone_id, tc.id as course_id, tc.ct_id, cs.cs_duration, cs.week_days, rz.zone_name,rz.zrti_type, cg.course_group,cg.types as cg_types,tc.* FROM training_calendars tc LEFT JOIN tra_masters tm ON tm.course_id = tc.id AND tm.is_approved=1 LEFT JOIN course_for cf ON cf.id = tc.cf_id LEFT JOIN courses cs ON cs.id = tc.ct_id LEFT JOIN rail_zones rz ON rz.id = tm.zone_id LEFT JOIN course_groups cg ON cg.id = tc.cg_id WHERE tc.status = 1 AND CURRENT_DATE between tc.from_date AND tc.to_date ORDER BY cf.sort_no ASC

description: Counts records in hostel_masters, hostel_buildings, hostel_rooms for the daily position reports1 page.
complete_sql: SELECT hb.id,hb.location, COALESCE(r.total_capacity, 0) AS total_capacity, COALESCE(m.occu_bed, 0) AS occu_bed, COALESCE(s.occu_beds, 0) AS occu_beds FROM hostel_buildings hb LEFT JOIN (SELECT building_id, SUM(room_beds) AS total_capacity FROM hostel_rooms WHERE status = 1 GROUP BY building_id) r ON r.building_id = hb.id LEFT JOIN (SELECT building_id, COUNT(beds) AS occu_bed FROM hostel_masters WHERE (h_status != 2 AND h_status != 4) AND plusbed=0 GROUP BY building_id) m ON m.building_id = hb.id LEFT JOIN (SELECT building_id, COUNT(beds) AS occu_beds FROM hostel_masters WHERE (h_status != 2 AND h_status != 4) AND plusbed=1 GROUP BY building_id) s ON s.building_id = hb.id WHERE hb.status = 1 ORDER BY hb.location ASC

description: Retrieves data from staff_leave, users for the daily position reports1 page.

AND tm.is_approved=1

complete_sql: SELECT tm.*, d.desi_code, dp.department_name FROM tra_masters tm JOIN designations AS d ON d.id=tm.desi_id JOIN departments AS dp ON dp.id=tm.dep_id WHERE tm.course_id =$course_id AND tm.is_approved=1 AND tm.status=1 ORDER BY dp.department_name ASC, d.desi_code ASC

description: Retrieves data from vehicle_masters, users, designations for the departure program page.
complete_sql: SELECT vb.*, u.name, u.mobile, d.desi_code FROM vehicle_masters as vb LEFT JOIN users as u ON u.id=vb.user_id LEFT JOIN designations as d ON d.id=u.desi_id where vb.v_status=0 AND vb.status=1 AND from_place=1 ORDER BY vb.from_date DESC

description: Retrieves data from rail_zones, tra_masters, divisions for the division wise railway - Copy page.
complete_sql: SELECT tm.*, d.division, rz.zone_code FROM tra_masters tm JOIN rail_zones AS rz ON rz.id=tm.zone_id JOIN divisions AS d ON d.id=tm.div_id WHERE tm.course_id = :course_id AND tm.is_approved=1 AND tm.status=1 ORDER BY rz.zone_code ASC, d.division ASC

complete_sql: SELECT tm.*, d.division, rz.zone_code, tc.course_code, tc.batch_no FROM tra_masters tm JOIN rail_zones AS rz ON rz.id=tm.zone_id JOIN divisions AS d ON d.id=tm.div_id JOIN training_calendars tc ON tm.course_id = tc.id WHERE tm.course_id IN ($course_ids) AND tm.is_approved=1 AND tm.status=1 ORDER BY rz.zone_code ASC, d.division ASC

complete_sql:
SELECT ft.*, us.name, GROUP_CONCAT(CONCAT(tc.program_name, ' - ', tc.course_code, ' ', tc.batch_no, ' (', DATE_FORMAT(tc.from_date, '%d-%b-%y'), ' to ', DATE_FORMAT(tc.to_date, '%d-%b-%y'), ')') SEPARATOR '
') AS course_info FROM field_training ft LEFT JOIN users us ON us.id = ft.created_by LEFT JOIN training_calendars tc ON FIND_IN_SET(tc.id, ft.course_id) WHERE ft.status = 1 AND DATE(ft.from_date) BETWEEN :from_date AND :to_date" . ($f_status ? " AND ft.f_status = :f_status" : "") . " GROUP BY ft.id ORDER BY DATE(ft.from_date) ASC

') AS course_info FROM field_training ft LEFT JOIN users us ON us.id = ft.created_by LEFT JOIN training_calendars tc ON FIND_IN_SET(tc.id, ft.course_id) WHERE ft.status = 1 AND ft.id=:id GROUP BY ft.id ORDER BY DATE(ft.from_date) ASC

description: Retrieves data from rail_stations, training_calendars, roles, divisions, users, rail_zones, designations, tra_masters for the hostel count report page.
complete_sql: SELECT tm.out_stay, tm.application_id, us.name, us.mobile, us.father_name, z.zone_code, rs.st_code, ds.desi_code, d.div_code, tc.batch_no, tc.course_code, tc.program_name, r.role_name FROM tra_masters tm JOIN users us ON us.id = tm.user_id LEFT JOIN training_calendars tc ON tc.id = tm.course_id LEFT JOIN divisions d ON d.id = tm.div_id LEFT JOIN rail_zones z ON z.id = tm.zone_id LEFT JOIN rail_stations rs ON rs.id = tm.station_id LEFT JOIN designations ds ON ds.id = us.desi_id LEFT JOIN roles r ON r.id = tm.role WHERE tm.course_id IN ($course_ids_str) AND tm.status = '1' AND tm.out_stay = 1 ORDER BY us.name ASC

description: Retrieves data from rail_stations, training_calendars, roles, divisions, users, hostel_masters, rail_zones, designations, tra_masters for the hostel count report page.
complete_sql: SELECT tm.application_id, us.name, us.mobile, us.email, d.desi_code, rz.zone_code, rs.st_name, rs.st_code, dv.div_code, tc.batch_no, tc.course_code, tc.program_name, r.role_name FROM tra_masters tm JOIN users us ON us.id = tm.user_id LEFT JOIN training_calendars tc ON tc.id = tm.course_id LEFT JOIN divisions dv ON dv.id = tm.div_id LEFT JOIN rail_zones rz ON rz.id = tm.zone_id LEFT JOIN rail_stations rs ON rs.id = tm.station_id LEFT JOIN designations d ON d.id = us.desi_id LEFT JOIN roles r ON r.id = tm.role WHERE tm.course_id IN ($course_ids_str) AND tm.status = '1' AND tm.is_approved = 1 AND tm.out_stay = 0 AND tm.user_id NOT IN ( SELECT user_id FROM hostel_masters WHERE course_id IN ($course_ids_str) ) ORDER BY us.name ASC

description: Retrieves data from rail_stations, users, divisions, hostel_masters, rail_zones, designations, hostel_buildings, hostel_rooms for the hostel count report page.
complete_sql: SELECT hm.id, hm.in_date, hm.out_date, hr.room_name, b.building_name, us.name, us.mobile, us.email, d.desi_code, rz.zone_code, rs.st_name, rs.st_code, dv.div_code, dv.division FROM hostel_masters hm LEFT JOIN hostel_rooms hr ON hr.id = hm.room_id LEFT JOIN hostel_buildings b ON b.id = hm.building_id LEFT JOIN users us ON us.id = hm.user_id LEFT JOIN designations d ON d.id = us.desi_id LEFT JOIN rail_stations rs ON rs.id = us.station_id LEFT JOIN divisions dv ON dv.id = us.div_id LEFT JOIN rail_zones rz ON rz.id = us.zone_id WHERE hm.course_id IN ($course_ids_str) AND hm.h_status = 1 ORDER BY hr.room_name, us.name ASC

description: Retrieves data from rail_stations, divisions, users, rail_zones, designations, tra_masters for the hostel count reportcopy page.
complete_sql: SELECT us.name, us.mobile, us.email, us.birth_date, d.desi_code, us.station_id, rz.zone_code, rs.st_name, rs.st_code, dv.div_code, dv.division FROM users us LEFT JOIN designations d ON d.id = us.desi_id LEFT JOIN rail_stations rs ON rs.id = us.station_id LEFT JOIN divisions dv ON dv.id = us.div_id LEFT JOIN rail_zones rz ON rz.id = us.zone_id LEFT JOIN tra_masters tm ON us.id = tm.user_id AND tm.is_approved != 2 WHERE us.id IN (SELECT user_id FROM tra_masters WHERE course_id IN ($course_ids_str) AND is_approved = 1 AND status = 1) AND us.status = 1 ORDER BY rz.zone_code, dv.div_code, rs.st_code ASC

description: Retrieves data from tra_masters, training_calendars, users for the hostel report daily page.

description: Counts records in hostel_masters, training_calendars for the hostel report daily page.
complete_sql: SELECT hm.course_id, hm.ct_id, tc.from_date, tc.to_date,tc.program_name, COUNT( CASE WHEN DATE(hm.in_date) < '$from_date' AND DATE(hm.out_date) >= '$from_date' THEN 1 END ) AS present_today, COUNT( CASE WHEN hm.h_status IN (1,2) AND DATE(hm.out_date) = '$from_date' THEN 1 END ) AS checked_out_till_today, COUNT( CASE WHEN DATE(hm.in_date) = '$from_date' THEN 1 END ) AS future_users FROM hostel_masters hm LEFT JOIN training_calendars tc ON tc.id=hm.course_id GROUP BY hm.course_id, hm.ct_id HAVING present_today > 0 OR checked_out_till_today > 0 OR future_users > 0 ORDER BY hm.course_id, hm.ct_id
