description: Retrieves data from training_calendars, users, item_prices, bill_receipts, tra_masters for the mess receipt report page.
complete_sql: SELECT u.name,tm.is_approved_date,tm.local_trainee,u.id AS user_id,tc.id AS course_id,tc.program_name,tc.course_code,tc.from_date,tc.to_date,DATEDIFF(tc.to_date, tm.is_approved_date) + 1 AS total_days, COALESCE(ipm.price,0) * (DATEDIFF(tc.to_date, tm.is_approved_date) + 1) AS expected_amount,br.amount,br.receipt_date,br.receipt_no,br.pay_by,br.txn_no,br.id AS receipt_id,br.price AS final_price, (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(br2.amount),0) FROM bill_receipts br2 WHERE br2.user_id = br.user_id AND br2.course_id = br.course_id AND br2.status=1) AS total_amount,br.overhead FROM tra_masters tm LEFT JOIN training_calendars AS tc ON tc.id = tm.course_id LEFT JOIN users AS u ON u.id = tm.user_id LEFT JOIN bill_receipts AS br ON br.course_id = tm.course_id AND br.user_id = tm.user_id AND br.status=1 LEFT JOIN item_prices AS ipm ON ipm.item_id = 4 AND ipm.effect_date = ( SELECT MAX(ip2.effect_date)FROM item_prices ip2 WHERE ip2.item_id = 4 AND ip2.effect_date <= tc.from_date) WHERE tm.is_approved = 1 $whr AND tm.status = 1

description: Retrieves data from training_calendars for the mess receipt report page.
complete_sql: SELECT program_name,from_date,to_date FROM training_calendars WHERE id = :cid

description: Retrieves data from bill_receipts_refund, users for the mess refund print page.
complete_sql: SELECT u.name, u.mobile, mb.* FROM bill_receipts_refund as mb LEFT JOIN users AS u ON u.id=mb.user_id WHERE mb.id=$id

description: Retrieves data from training_calendars, courses, users for the modal room report page.
complete_sql: SELECT c.course_name,c.cs_duration, c.week_days, tc.fail_status,tc.cg_id, tc.course_code, tc.cd_user_id,tc.from_date, tc.to_date, tc.batch_no, tc.program_name,u.name, tc.course_director, tc.examiner FROM training_calendars tc LEFT JOIN courses c ON c.id = tc.ct_id LEFT JOIN users u ON u.id = tc.cd_user_id WHERE tc.id = :id

description: Retrieves data from training_calendars, courses, users for the modal room report failure page.
complete_sql: SELECT c.course_name,c.cs_duration, c.week_days, tc.extended_date, tc.course_code,tc.cg_id, tc.from_date, tc.to_date, tc.extended_date,tc.batch_no, tc.program_name, tc.fail_status,u.name, tc.course_director, tc.examiner FROM training_calendars tc LEFT JOIN courses c ON c.id = tc.ct_id LEFT JOIN users u ON u.id = tc.cd_user_id WHERE tc.id = :id

description: Retrieves data from training_calendars, courses for the nominate trainee report page.
complete_sql: SELECT c.course_name,tc.course_code,tc.from_date,tc.to_date FROM training_calendars tc LEFT JOIN courses as c on c.id=tc.ct_id where tc.id =$course_id AND tc.office_id=".$_SESSION['user']['office_id']

description: Retrieves data from options for the nominate trainee report page.
complete_sql: SELECT value_s FROM options WHERE key_s = 'report_header' AND office_id=".$_SESSION['user']['office_id']

description: Retrieves data from users, divisions, states, rail_zones, designations, tra_masters for the nominate trainee report page.
complete_sql: SELECT us.gender,us.name,us.mobile,us.email, d.desi_code, st.state,rz.zone_code, ds.division, tm.group_id FROM users us LEFT JOIN designations d ON d.id = us.desi_id AND d.desi_type=1 LEFT JOIN states st ON st.id = us.upsc_state LEFT JOIN tra_masters tm ON tm.user_id = us.id AND tm.course_id=$course_id LEFT JOIN rail_zones rz ON us.zone_id = rz.id LEFT JOIN divisions ds ON ds.id = us.div_id where us.id IN (SELECT user_id FROM tra_masters WHERE course_id=$course_id $whrs $whr) AND us.status=1 AND us.office_id=".$_SESSION['user']['office_id']

description: Retrieves data from pass_type for the pass-print page.
complete_sql: SELECT * FROM pass_type ORDER BY sort_no DESC

description: Retrieves data from users, pay_level, departments, pass, designations, pass_type for the pass-print page.
complete_sql: SELECT ps.*,us.name,us.desi_id,us.id,ds.desi_name,pt.pass_type, dp.department_name,us.date_of_appointment ,pb.g_pay FROM pass ps LEFT JOIN users us ON ps.user_id = us.id LEFT JOIN designations ds ON us.desi_id = ds.id LEFT JOIN pass_type pt ON ps.pass_type = pt.id LEFT JOIN departments dp ON us.dep_id = dp.id LEFT JOIN pay_level pb ON pb.id = us.pay_level WHERE ps.status=1 AND ps.id= :pass_id

description: Retrieves data from users for the pass-print page.
complete_sql: SELECT *, TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR, birth_date, CURDATE()) AS traage FROM users where status=1 AND id=

description: Retrieves data from divisions, users, hostel_masters, rail_zones, hostel_buildings, hostel_rooms for the room change trainee page.
complete_sql: SELECT hm.*, u.name,u.div_id,d.div_code,d.division, hr.room_name, hb.building_name, hb.location, r.zone_code FROM hostel_masters hm LEFT JOIN users u ON u.id = hm.user_id LEFT JOIN divisions d ON d.id =u.div_id LEFT JOIN hostel_rooms hr ON hm.room_id = hr.id LEFT JOIN hostel_buildings hb ON hm.building_id = hb.id LEFT JOIN rail_zones r ON r.id =u.zone_id WHERE hm.h_status = 1 AND hm.room_change_flag = 1 $whrs ORDER BY hb.building_name ASC, CAST(hr.room_name AS UNSIGNED) ASC

description: Retrieves data from divisions, users, hostel_masters, rail_zones, hostel_buildings, hostel_rooms for the room position trainee page.
complete_sql: SELECT hm.*, u.name,u.div_id,d.div_code,d.division, hr.room_name, hb.building_name, hb.location, r.zone_code FROM hostel_masters hm LEFT JOIN users u ON u.id = hm.user_id LEFT JOIN divisions d ON d.id =u.div_id LEFT JOIN hostel_rooms hr ON hm.room_id = hr.id LEFT JOIN hostel_buildings hb ON hm.building_id = hb.id LEFT JOIN rail_zones r ON r.id =u.zone_id WHERE hm.h_status = 1 $whrs ORDER BY hb.building_name ASC, CAST(hr.room_name AS UNSIGNED) ASC

description: Retrieves data from feed_master, rail_zones, tra_masters, training_calendars for the simulator feedback page.
complete_sql: SELECT tc.*,fm.*,rz.zone_code,tr.zone_id FROM training_calendars tc LEFT JOIN feed_master AS fm ON fm.course_id=tc.id LEFT JOIN tra_masters AS tr ON tr.user_id=fm.user_id LEFT JOIN rail_zones AS rz ON rz.id=tr.zone_id WHERE fm.fq_id = 35 AND fm.status = 1 AND fm.response!='' AND fm.final_submit=1 AND tc.status!=2 AND NOT (tc.from_date > '$to_date' OR tc.to_date < '$from_date') ORDER BY tc.from_date

description: Retrieves data from sport_item for the sports material report page.
complete_sql: SELECT si.id, si.sport_item FROM sport_item si WHERE si.status = 1 AND (:item_id = 0 OR si.id = :item_id) ORDER BY si.sport_item

description: Retrieves data from sport_material, sport_item for the sports material report page.
complete_sql: SELECT si.id, si.sport_item, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN sm.type = 0 THEN sm.qty ELSE 0 END), 0) - COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN sm.type = 1 THEN sm.qty ELSE 0 END), 0) AS bf_quantity FROM sport_item si LEFT JOIN sport_material sm ON sm.item_id = si.id AND sm.status = 1 AND sm.purchase_date < :from_date WHERE si.status = 1 AND (:item_id = 0 OR si.id = :item_id) GROUP BY si.id, si.sport_item ORDER BY si.sport_item

description: Retrieves data from sport_material, partys, sport_item for the sports material report page.
complete_sql: SELECT sm.*, si.sport_item, p.p_name as party_name FROM sport_material sm LEFT JOIN sport_item si ON si.id = sm.item_id LEFT JOIN partys p ON p.id = sm.party_id WHERE sm.status = 1 AND sm.purchase_date BETWEEN :from_date AND :to_date AND (:item_id = 0 OR sm.item_id = :item_id) ORDER BY si.sport_item, sm.purchase_date

description: Retrieves data from sport_material, sport_item for the sports material report page.
complete_sql: SELECT si.id, si.sport_item, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN sm.purchase_date < :from_date AND sm.type = 0 THEN sm.qty ELSE 0 END), 0) - COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN sm.purchase_date < :from_date AND sm.type = 1 THEN sm.qty ELSE 0 END), 0) AS opening_stock, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN sm.purchase_date BETWEEN :from_date AND :to_date AND sm.type = 0 THEN sm.qty ELSE 0 END), 0) AS total_purchased, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN sm.purchase_date BETWEEN :from_date AND :to_date AND sm.type = 1 THEN sm.qty ELSE 0 END), 0) AS total_condemned FROM sport_item si LEFT JOIN sport_material sm ON sm.item_id = si.id AND sm.status = 1 WHERE si.status = 1 AND (:item_id = 0 OR si.id = :item_id) GROUP BY si.id, si.sport_item ORDER BY si.sport_item

description: Retrieves data from training_calendars, srec_sport for the srec pending report page.
complete_sql: SELECT tc.id AS course_id, tc.program_name, tc.course_batch, tc.batch_no, tc.from_date, tc.to_date, SUM(ss.total) AS received_amount FROM srec_sport ss LEFT JOIN training_calendars tc ON tc.id = ss.course_id WHERE ss.status = 1 AND ss.receipt_date BETWEEN '$from_date_sql' AND '$to_date_sql' AND (tc.id IS NULL OR (tc.from_date <= '$to_date_sql' AND tc.to_date >= '$from_date_sql')) GROUP BY tc.id ORDER BY ss.receipt_date ASC

description: Retrieves data from training_calendars, srec_sport for the srec pending report page.
complete_sql: SELECT tc.id AS course_id, tc.program_name, tc.course_batch, tc.batch_no, tc.from_date, tc.to_date FROM training_calendars tc WHERE tc.status = 1 AND tc.from_date BETWEEN '$from_date_sql' AND '$to_date_sql' AND tc.id NOT IN ( SELECT DISTINCT course_id FROM srec_sport WHERE status = 1 ) ORDER BY tc.to_date ASC

description: Retrieves data from training_calendars, srec_sport for the srec sports receipt - Copy page.
complete_sql: SELECT ss.*, tc.program_name, tc.from_date, tc.to_date FROM srec_sport ss LEFT JOIN training_calendars tc ON tc.id = ss.course_id WHERE ss.status = 1 AND ss.id = $receipt_id ORDER BY tc.from_date ASC

description: Retrieves data from training_calendars, srec_sport for the srec sports receipt page.
complete_sql: SELECT ss.*, tc.program_name, tc.from_date, tc.to_date FROM srec_sport ss LEFT JOIN training_calendars tc ON tc.id = ss.course_id WHERE ss.status = 1 AND ss.id = $id ORDER BY tc.from_date ASC

description: Retrieves data from training_calendars, srec_sport for the srec sports receipt1 page.
complete_sql: SELECT ss.*, tc.program_name, tc.from_date, tc.to_date FROM srec_sport ss LEFT JOIN training_calendars tc ON tc.id = ss.course_id WHERE ss.status = 1 ORDER BY tc.from_date ASC

description: Retrieves data from options for the srec sports report - Copy page.
complete_sql: SELECT value_s FROM options WHERE key_s = 'report_header'" " AND ss.receipt_date BETWEEN '$from_date' AND '$to_date'" " ORDER BY ss.receipt_date ASC

description: Retrieves data from training_calendars, srec_sport for the srec sports report - Copy page.
complete_sql: SELECT ss.*, ss.id as receipt_id, tc.program_name FROM srec_sport ss LEFT JOIN training_calendars tc ON tc.id = ss.course_id WHERE ss.status = 1" " AND ss.receipt_date BETWEEN '$from_date' AND '$to_date'" " ORDER BY ss.receipt_date ASC

description: Retrieves data from training_calendars, srec_sport for the srec sports report page.
complete_sql: SELECT ss.*, ss.id as receipt_id,tc.course_batch, tc.program_name, tc.from_date, tc.to_date FROM srec_sport ss LEFT JOIN training_calendars tc ON tc.id = ss.course_id WHERE ss.status = 1" " AND ss.receipt_date BETWEEN '$from_date' AND '$to_date'" " ORDER BY ss.receipt_date ASC

description: Retrieves data from users, designations for the staff icard page.
complete_sql: SELECT us.*, d.desi_code FROM users us LEFT JOIN designations d ON d.id = us.desi_id where us.status=1 AND us.role_id = 2 $whr

description: Retrieves data from training_calendars, study_tour, users, designations for the study tour report page.
complete_sql:
SELECT st.*, us.s_name, ds.desi_code, ds.desi_name, GROUP_CONCAT(CONCAT(tc.program_name, ' - ', tc.course_code, ' ', tc.batch_no, ' (', DATE_FORMAT(tc.from_date, '%d-%b-%y'), ' to ', DATE_FORMAT(tc.to_date, '%d-%b-%y'), ')') SEPARATOR '
') AS course_info FROM study_tour st LEFT JOIN users us ON us.id = st.staff_id LEFT JOIN designations ds ON ds.id = st.staff_desi_id LEFT JOIN training_calendars tc ON FIND_IN_SET(tc.id, st.course_id) WHERE st.status = 1 AND DATE(st.from_date) BETWEEN :from_date AND :to_date $status_f GROUP BY st.id ORDER BY DATE(st.from_date) ASC

description: Retrieves data from training_calendars, study_tour, users, designations for the study tour single report page.
complete_sql:
SELECT st.*, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT CONCAT(us.s_name,' (', ds.desi_code, ')')ORDER BY us.s_name SEPARATOR ', ') AS staff_details, GROUP_CONCAT(CONCAT(tc.program_name, ' - ', tc.course_code, ' ', tc.batch_no, ' (', DATE_FORMAT(tc.from_date, '%d-%b-%y'), ' to ', DATE_FORMAT(tc.to_date, '%d-%b-%y'), ')') SEPARATOR '
') AS course_info FROM study_tour st LEFT JOIN users us ON FIND_IN_SET(us.id, st.staff_id) LEFT JOIN users u ON u.id = st.created_by LEFT JOIN designations ds ON ds.id = us.desi_id LEFT JOIN training_calendars tc ON FIND_IN_SET(tc.id, st.course_id) WHERE st.status = 1 AND st.id = :id GROUP BY st.id ORDER BY DATE(st.from_date) ASC

description: Retrieves data from class_rooms, training_calendars, users, designations for the time-table-view page.
complete_sql: select tc.*,ds.desi_code as desi_cd,dss.desi_code as desi_ccd,us.name,cr.class_name from training_calendars tc LEFT JOIN designations ds ON ds.id=tc.cd LEFT JOIN designations dss ON dss.id=tc.ccd LEFT JOIN class_rooms cr ON cr.id=tc.class_id LEFT JOIN users us ON us.id=tc.ati where tc.id='.$time_table['course_id']

description: Retrieves data from time_masters for the time-table-view page.
complete_sql: select tm_date, id from time_masters where course_id=

description: Retrieves data from time_masters, users, topics, designations for the time-table-view page.
complete_sql: select tm.*,tp.topic_name, ds.desi_code,dss.desi_code as sec_desi_code, dss1.desi_code as three_desi_code, dss2.desi_code as four_desi_code, dss3.desi_code as five_desi_code, us.name,usd.name as desiusername,ussd.name as secusername from time_masters tm LEFT JOIN topics tp on tp.id=tm.topic_id LEFT JOIN designations ds ON ds.id=tm.desi_id LEFT JOIN designations dss ON dss.id=tm.sec_id LEFT JOIN designations dss1 ON dss1.id=tm.desi_id_three LEFT JOIN designations dss2 ON dss2.id=tm.desi_id_four LEFT JOIN designations dss3 ON dss3.id=tm.desi_id_five LEFT JOIN users us ON us.id=tm.vl_id LEFT JOIN users usd ON usd.id=tm.desi_user_id LEFT JOIN users ussd ON ussd.id=tm.sec_user_id where tm.status=1 AND tm.tm_date=

description: Retrieves data from time_masters for the time-table-view page.
complete_sql: select sum(hours) as tthours from time_masters where tm_date=

description: Retrieves data from training_calendars, courses for the trainee id card - Copy page.
complete_sql: SELECT tc.course_code,tc.from_date,tc.to_date,c.course_name,tc.batch_no,tc.cd, tc.cd_user_id FROM training_calendars tc left join courses as c on c.id=tc.ct_id where tc.id = :course_id

description: Retrieves data from users for the trainee id card - Copy page.
complete_sql: SELECT signature, name FROM users where id=".$course['cd_user_id']

description: Retrieves data from designations for the trainee id card - Copy page.
complete_sql: SELECT desi_name FROM designations where id=".$course['cd']

description: Retrieves data from rail_stations, divisions, users, depots, rail_zones, designations, tra_masters for the trainee id card - Copy page.
complete_sql: SELECT us.*,dp.depots, dv.division, rz.zone_name, rz.zone_code, d.desi_code,rs.st_name,rs.st_code FROM users us LEFT JOIN depots dp ON dp.id = us.depo_id LEFT JOIN designations d ON d.id = us.desi_id LEFT JOIN divisions dv ON dv.id = us.div_id LEFT JOIN rail_zones rz ON us.zone_id = rz.id LEFT JOIN rail_stations rs ON us.station_id = rs.id where us.id IN (SELECT user_id FROM tra_masters WHERE course_id = :course_id AND is_approved=1) AND us.status=1

description: Retrieves data from training_calendars, courses for the trainee id card page.
complete_sql: SELECT tc.id, tc.course_code, tc.from_date, tc.to_date, c.course_name, tc.batch_no, tc.cd, tc.cd_user_id FROM training_calendars tc LEFT JOIN courses c ON c.id = tc.ct_id WHERE tc.id IN ($course_id)

description: Retrieves data from users for the trainee id card page.
complete_sql: SELECT id, signature, name FROM users WHERE id IN ($placeholders)

description: Retrieves data from designations for the trainee id card page.
complete_sql: SELECT id, desi_name FROM designations WHERE id IN ($placeholders)

description: Retrieves data from rail_stations, divisions, users, depots, rail_zones, designations, tra_masters for the trainee id card page.
complete_sql: SELECT us.*, dp.depots, dv.division, rz.zone_name, rz.zone_code, d.desi_code, rs.st_name, rs.st_code, tm.course_id FROM users us LEFT JOIN depots dp ON dp.id = us.depo_id LEFT JOIN designations d ON d.id = us.desi_id LEFT JOIN divisions dv ON dv.id = us.div_id LEFT JOIN rail_zones rz ON us.zone_id = rz.id LEFT JOIN rail_stations rs ON us.station_id = rs.id LEFT JOIN tra_masters tm ON tm.user_id = us.id WHERE tm.course_id IN ($course_id) AND tm.is_approved = 1 AND us.status = 1 GROUP BY tm.user_id, tm.course_id ORDER BY tm.course_id, us.name

description: Retrieves data from training_calendars, courses for the trainee id card gu page.
complete_sql: SELECT tc.course_code, tc.from_date, tc.to_date, c.course_name, tc.batch_no, tc.dir_desi_id, tc.dir_user_id FROM training_calendars tc LEFT JOIN courses AS c ON c.id = tc.ct_id WHERE tc.id = :course_id

description: Retrieves data from users for the trainee id card gu page.
complete_sql: SELECT signature, name FROM users WHERE id = " . $course['dir_user_id']

description: Retrieves data from designations for the trainee id card gu page.
complete_sql: SELECT desi_name FROM designations WHERE id = " . $course['dir_desi_id']

description: Retrieves data from rail_stations, divisions, users, depots, rail_zones, designations, tra_masters for the trainee id card gu page.
complete_sql: SELECT us.*, dp.depots, dv.division, rz.zone_name, rz.zone_code, d.desi_code, rs.st_name, rs.st_code FROM users us LEFT JOIN depots dp ON dp.id = us.depo_id LEFT JOIN designations d ON d.id = us.desi_id LEFT JOIN divisions dv ON dv.id = us.div_id LEFT JOIN rail_zones rz ON us.zone_id = rz.id LEFT JOIN rail_stations rs ON us.station_id = rs.id WHERE us.id IN (SELECT user_id FROM tra_masters WHERE course_id = :course_id AND is_approved = 1) AND us.status = 1

description: Retrieves data from training_calendars, courses for the trainee lapel page.
complete_sql: SELECT tc.id, tc.course_code, tc.from_date, tc.to_date, tc.batch_no, c.course_name FROM training_calendars tc JOIN courses c ON c.id = tc.ct_id WHERE tc.id IN ($course_id)

description: Retrieves data from rail_zones, tra_masters, users, designations for the trainee lapel page.
complete_sql: SELECT us.photo, us.name, us.mobile, us.user_code, us.id, d.desi_code, rz.zone_code, tm.course_id FROM users us LEFT JOIN designations d ON d.id = us.desi_id LEFT JOIN rail_zones rz ON us.zone_id = rz.id JOIN tra_masters tm ON tm.user_id = us.id WHERE tm.course_id IN ($course_id) AND tm.is_approved = 1 AND us.status = 1 ORDER BY tm.course_id, us.name

description: Retrieves data from training_calendars, courses for the trainee leaves page.
complete_sql: SELECT c.course_name, tc.course_code, tc.from_date, tc.to_date,tc.batch_no, tc.course_batch, tc.program_name,tc.program_name_hindi FROM training_calendars tc LEFT JOIN courses c ON c.id = tc.ct_id WHERE tc.id IN ($course_id) AND tc.status=1

description: Retrieves data from rail_stations, divisions, users, rail_zones, designations, tra_masters for the trainee leaves page.
complete_sql: SELECT us.id,us.name,us.name_hindi,us.father_name,us.father_name_hindi,d.desi_code,rz.zone_code,rs.st_code,dv.div_code,tm.is_approved_date FROM users us LEFT JOIN designations d ON d.id = us.desi_id LEFT JOIN rail_zones rz ON rz.id = us.zone_id LEFT JOIN divisions dv ON dv.id = us.div_id LEFT JOIN rail_stations rs ON rs.id = us.station_id LEFT JOIN tra_masters tm ON us.id = tm.user_id WHERE tm.course_id IN ($course_id) AND tm.is_approved = 1 AND tm.status = 1 AND us.status = 1 ORDER BY date(tm.is_approved_date), rz.zone_code, dv.division, rs.st_code,tm.id ASC

description: Retrieves data from attendances for the trainee leaves page.
complete_sql: SELECT user_id,punch,punch_time FROM attendances WHERE course_id IN ($course_id) AND status = 1 AND DATE(punch_time) BETWEEN '$from_date' AND '$to_date' ORDER BY user_id,punch_time

description: Retrieves data from attendances for the trainee leaves page.
complete_sql: SELECT * FROM attendances WHERE user_id=".$value['id']." AND course_id IN ($course_id) AND status=1 AND DATE(punch_time) BETWEEN '$from_date' AND '$to_date' ORDER BY punch_time ASC

description: Retrieves data from rail_stations, divisions, users, rail_zones, designations, tra_masters for the trainee list1 page.
complete_sql: SELECT us.name,us.name_hindi, us.mobile, us.email, us.birth_date, d.desi_code, us.station_id, tm.is_approved_date, rz.zone_code, rs.st_code, dv.div_code FROM users us LEFT JOIN designations d ON d.id = us.desi_id LEFT JOIN rail_stations rs ON rs.id = us.station_id LEFT JOIN divisions dv ON dv.id = us.div_id LEFT JOIN rail_zones rz ON rz.id=us.zone_id LEFT JOIN tra_masters tm ON us.id=tm.user_id where us.id IN (SELECT user_id FROM tra_masters WHERE course_id = :course_id AND is_approved=1 AND status=1) AND us.status=1 ORDER BY rz.zone_code, dv.div_code,rs.st_code ASC

description: Retrieves data from rail_stations, divisions, users, rail_zones, designations, tra_masters for the trainee list pending - Copy page.
complete_sql: SELECT us.name, us.mobile, us.email, us.birth_date, d.desi_code, us.station_id, tm.is_approved_date, rz.zone_code, rs.st_code, dv.div_code FROM users us LEFT JOIN designations d ON d.id = us.desi_id LEFT JOIN rail_stations rs ON rs.id = us.station_id LEFT JOIN divisions dv ON dv.id = us.div_id LEFT JOIN rail_zones rz ON rz.id=us.zone_id LEFT JOIN tra_masters tm ON us.id=tm.user_id where tm.course_id = :course_id AND tm.is_approved=0 AND tm.status=1 AND us.status=1 ORDER BY rz.zone_code, dv.div_code,rs.st_code ASC

description: Retrieves data from rail_stations, divisions, users, rail_zones, designations, tra_masters for the trainee list pending page.
complete_sql: SELECT us.name, us.mobile, us.email, us.birth_date, d.desi_code, us.station_id, tm.is_approved_date, rz.zone_code, rs.st_code, dv.div_code FROM users us LEFT JOIN designations d ON d.id = us.desi_id LEFT JOIN rail_stations rs ON rs.id = us.station_id LEFT JOIN divisions dv ON dv.id = us.div_id LEFT JOIN rail_zones rz ON rz.id=us.zone_id LEFT JOIN tra_masters tm ON us.id=tm.user_id where tm.course_id IN ($course_id) AND tm.is_approved=0 AND tm.status=1 AND us.status=1 ORDER BY rz.zone_code, dv.div_code,rs.st_code ASC

description: Retrieves data from rail_stations, divisions, users, rail_zones, designations, tra_masters for the trainee list rejected - Copy page.

description: Counts records in tra_masters, training_calendars for the dashboard hostel page.
complete_sql: SELECT tc.program_name, tc.from_date, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT tc.id ORDER BY tc.id) as ids, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT tc.batch_no ORDER BY tc.batch_no SEPARATOR ', ') as batch_numbers, COUNT(DISTINCT tm.id) as admission_count FROM training_calendars tc LEFT JOIN tra_masters tm ON tm.course_id = tc.id AND tm.is_approved != 2 WHERE tc.status = 1 AND (tc.from_date BETWEEN '$from_date' AND '$to_date') AND tc.office_id = ".$_OFFICE_ID." GROUP BY tc.program_name, DATE(tc.from_date) ORDER BY tc.from_date ASC

description: Counts records in tra_masters, training_calendars for the dashboard hostel page.
complete_sql: SELECT tc.program_name, tc.from_date, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT tc.id ORDER BY tc.id) AS ids, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT tc.batch_no ORDER BY tc.batch_no SEPARATOR ', ') AS batch_numbers, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN tm.is_approved = 1 AND DATE(tm.is_approved_date) = '$current_date' THEN tm.id END) AS today_admission_count, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN tm.is_approved !=2 THEN tm.id END) AS total_register_count, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN tm.is_approved =1 THEN tm.id END) AS total_admission_approve FROM training_calendars tc LEFT JOIN tra_masters tm ON tm.course_id = tc.id AND tm.is_approved != 2 WHERE tc.status = 1 AND (tc.from_date BETWEEN '$from_date' AND '$to_date') AND tc.office_id = 1 GROUP BY tc.program_name, DATE(tc.from_date) ORDER BY tc.from_date ASC

description: Counts records in tra_masters, training_calendars for the dashboard hostel page.
complete_sql: SELECT tc.program_name, tc.from_date, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT tc.id ORDER BY tc.id SEPARATOR ',') AS ids, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT tc.batch_no ORDER BY tc.batch_no SEPARATOR ', ') AS batch_numbers, SUM( (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tra_masters tm WHERE tm.course_id = tc.id AND DATE(tm.is_approved_date) = '$current_date' AND tm.is_approved = 1) ) AS admission_count FROM training_calendars tc WHERE tc.status = 1 AND (tc.from_date BETWEEN '$from_date' AND '$to_date') AND tc.office_id = ".$_OFFICE_ID." GROUP BY tc.program_name, DATE(tc.from_date) ORDER BY tc.from_date ASC

GROUP BY tc.id ORDER BY tc.from_date ASC

complete_sql: SELECT tm.*,tm.id as tm_id, tc.*, em.*, tc.id as tc_id ,tm.is_approved as tm_approved from tra_masters tm LEFT JOIN training_calendars as tc ON tm.course_id=tc.id left join users as em on em.id=tm.user_id WHERE tm.user_id = $user_id AND tc.from_date <= CURDATE() AND tc.to_date >= CURDATE() AND tm.status=1 order by tc.to_date DESC

description: Counts records in tra_masters, training_calendars for the dashboard.inc page.
complete_sql: SELECT MAX(tc.id) AS course_id, tc.program_name, tc.from_date, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT tc.id ORDER BY tc.id) AS ids, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT tc.batch_no ORDER BY tc.batch_no SEPARATOR ', ') AS batch_numbers, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN tm.is_approved = 1 AND DATE(tm.is_approved_date) = '$current_date' THEN tm.id END) AS today_admission_count, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN tm.is_approved != 2 AND tm.status=1 THEN tm.id END) AS total_register_count, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN tm.is_approved = 1 AND tm.status=1 THEN tm.id END) AS total_admission_approve FROM training_calendars tc LEFT JOIN tra_masters tm ON tm.course_id = tc.id AND tm.is_approved != 2 WHERE tc.status = 1 AND (tc.from_date BETWEEN '$from_date' AND '$to_date') AND tc.office_id = ".$_OFFICE_ID." GROUP BY tc.program_name, DATE(tc.from_date) ORDER BY tc.from_date ASC

description: Counts records in tra_masters, training_calendars for the dashboard.inc 111125 page.
complete_sql: SELECT tc.id AS course_id, tc.program_name, tc.from_date, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT tc.id ORDER BY tc.id) AS ids, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT tc.batch_no ORDER BY tc.batch_no SEPARATOR ', ') AS batch_numbers, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN tm.is_approved = 1 AND DATE(tm.is_approved_date) = '$current_date' THEN tm.id END) AS today_admission_count, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN tm.is_approved != 2 THEN tm.id END) AS total_register_count, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN tm.is_approved = 1 THEN tm.id END) AS total_admission_approve FROM training_calendars tc LEFT JOIN tra_masters tm ON tm.course_id = tc.id AND tm.is_approved != 2 WHERE tc.status = 1 AND (tc.from_date BETWEEN '$from_date' AND '$to_date') AND tc.office_id = ".$_OFFICE_ID." GROUP BY tc.program_name, DATE(tc.from_date) ORDER BY tc.from_date ASC

description: Counts records in hostel_masters, tra_masters, training_calendars for the dashboard.inc 111125 page.
complete_sql: SELECT tc.id AS course_id, tc.program_name, tc.from_date, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT tc.id ORDER BY tc.id) AS ids, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN hm.h_status = 1 THEN hm.id END) AS booked_count, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN tm.out_stay = 1 THEN tm.id END) AS outstay_count FROM training_calendars tc LEFT JOIN hostel_masters hm ON hm.course_id = tc.id LEFT JOIN tra_masters tm ON tm.course_id = tc.id WHERE tc.status = 1 AND (tc.from_date BETWEEN '$from_date' AND '$to_date') AND tc.office_id = ".$_OFFICE_ID." GROUP BY tc.program_name, DATE(tc.from_date) ORDER BY tc.from_date ASC

description: Retrieves data from rail_stations, training_calendars, divisions, users, hostel_masters, rail_zones, tra_masters for the dashboard.inc 111125 page.
complete_sql: SELECT tm.id,tm.application_id,tm.out_stay,tm.user_id,tm.course_id, us.name,us.father_name,z.zone_code,rs.st_code, d.div_code,tc.batch_no,tc.course_code,tc.program_name FROM tra_masters tm LEFT JOIN users us ON us.id = tm.user_id LEFT JOIN divisions d ON d.id = tm.div_id LEFT JOIN rail_zones z ON z.id = tm.zone_id LEFT JOIN rail_stations rs ON rs.id = tm.station_id JOIN training_calendars tc ON tc.id = tm.course_id AND tc.to_date >= CURRENT_DATE() WHERE tm.status = 1 AND tm.is_approved=1 AND tm.out_stay = 0 AND tm.user_id NOT IN (SELECT user_id FROM hostel_masters WHERE user_id= tm.user_id AND course_id = tm.course_id) $whs AND tm.office_id =".$_OFFICE_ID." ORDER BY us.name,z.zone_code,d.div_code ASC

description: Retrieves data from seminars_topic, seminars for the test demo.inc - Copy page.
complete_sql:
SELECT s.*, GROUP_CONCAT( DISTINCT CASE WHEN st.id = 2000 THEN CONCAT(st.sub_topic, ' - ', s.topic_des)ELSE st.sub_topic END ORDER BY st.id SEPARATOR '
') AS toic_name FROM seminars s // LEFT JOIN seminars_topic st ON FIND_IN_SET(st.id, s.topic_id) // WHERE s.status = 1 AND s.se_status=1 AND s.forward_id=".$_SESSION['user']['id']." GROUP BY s.id ORDER BY s.id

description: Retrieves data from users, training_calendars, field_trainee for the test demo.inc - Copy page.
complete_sql:
SELECT ft.*, us.name, GROUP_CONCAT(CONCAT(tc.program_name, ' - ', tc.course_code, ' ', tc.batch_no, ' (', DATE_FORMAT(tc.from_date, '%d-%b-%y'), ' to ', DATE_FORMAT(tc.to_date, '%d-%b-%y'), ')') SEPARATOR '
') AS course_info FROM field_trainee ft // LEFT JOIN users us ON us.id = ft.created_by // LEFT JOIN training_calendars tc ON FIND_IN_SET(tc.id, ft.course_id) WHERE ft.status = 1 AND ft.f_status=1 AND ft.forward_id=".$_SESSION['user']['id']." // GROUP BY ft.id ORDER BY DATE(ft.from_date) ASC

description: Retrieves data from complaint_subcat, complaints, complaint_cat for the test demo.inc - Copy page.
complete_sql: SELECT c.*, cc.comp_name, cs.subcat_name FROM complaints c LEFT JOIN complaint_cat cc ON cc.id = c.ctype_id LEFT JOIN complaint_subcat cs ON cs.id = c.ctype_sub_id WHERE c.status = 1 AND c.cm_status = 1 $whc ORDER BY c.created_at DESC

description: Retrieves data from seminars_topic, seminars for the test demo.inc - Copy page.
complete_sql:
SELECT s.*, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN st.id = 2000 THEN CONCAT(st.sub_topic, ' - ', s.topic_des) ELSE st.sub_topic END ORDER BY st.id SEPARATOR '
') AS topic_name FROM seminars s LEFT JOIN seminars_topic st ON FIND_IN_SET(st.id, s.topic_id) WHERE s.status = 1 AND s.se_status = 1 AND s.forward_id = $user_id GROUP BY s.id ORDER BY s.id DESC

description: Retrieves data from training_calendars, study_tour, users, designations for the test demo.inc - Copy page.
complete_sql:
SELECT st.id AS study_id, st.*, us.name, ds.desi_code, ds.desi_name, GROUP_CONCAT(CONCAT(tc.program_name, ' - ', tc.course_code, ' ', tc.batch_no, ' (', DATE_FORMAT(tc.from_date, '%d-%b-%y'), ' to ', DATE_FORMAT(tc.to_date, '%d-%b-%y'), ')') SEPARATOR '
') AS course_info FROM study_tour st LEFT JOIN users us ON us.id = st.staff_id LEFT JOIN designations ds ON ds.id = st.staff_desi_id LEFT JOIN training_calendars tc ON FIND_IN_SET(tc.id, st.course_id) WHERE st.status = 1 AND st.s_status = 1 AND st.forward_id = $user_id GROUP BY st.id ORDER BY DATE(st.from_date) ASC

description: Retrieves data from meeting_create for the test demo.inc - Copy page.
complete_sql: SELECT mc.* FROM meeting_create mc WHERE mc.status = 1 AND mc.m_status = 1 AND mc.forward_id = $user_id ORDER BY mc.id ASC

description: Retrieves data from inspection_notes, inspection_description for the test demo.inc - Copy page.
complete_sql: SELECT i.*, ide.id AS d_id FROM inspection_description ide LEFT JOIN inspection_notes i ON i.id = ide.insp_id WHERE FIND_IN_SET(:user_id, ide.faculty_id) > 0 AND ide.status = 1 AND i.status = 1 AND ide.i_status IN (0,1) AND ide.office_id = 1 GROUP BY i.id ORDER BY i.from_date ASC

description: Retrieves data from seminars_topic, seminars for the test demo.inc page.
complete_sql:
SELECT s.*, s.id AS sim_id,GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN st.id = 2000 THEN CONCAT(st.sub_topic, ' - ', s.topic_des) ELSE st.sub_topic END ORDER BY st.id SEPARATOR '
' ) AS toic_name FROM seminars s LEFT JOIN seminars_topic st ON FIND_IN_SET(st.id, s.topic_id) WHERE s.status = 1 AND s.se_status = 3 AND s.sem_date BETWEEN CURDATE() AND '$totald' GROUP BY s.id ORDER BY s.id

description: Retrieves data from seminars_topic, seminars for the test demo.inc page.
complete_sql:
SELECT s.*,GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN st.id = 2000 THEN CONCAT(st.sub_topic, ' - ', s.topic_des) ELSE st.sub_topic END ORDER BY st.id SEPARATOR '
') AS topic_name FROM seminars s LEFT JOIN seminars_topic st ON FIND_IN_SET(st.id, s.topic_id) WHERE s.status = 1 AND s.se_status = 1 AND s.forward_id = $user_id GROUP BY s.id ORDER BY s.id DESC

description: Retrieves data from seminar_notices for the test demo.inc page.

description: Counts records in rail_zones, users for the trainee data.inc page.
complete_sql: SELECT rz.zone_code, COUNT(u.id) AS ZONE_TRAINEE FROM rail_zones rz LEFT JOIN users AS u ON u.zone_id=rz.id WHERE u.status=1 AND u.role_id=1 GROUP BY rz.zone_code ORDER BY ZONE_TRAINEE DESC

description: Counts records in users, divisions for the trainee data.inc page.
complete_sql: SELECT d.div_code, COUNT(u.id) AS DIV_TRAINEE FROM divisions d LEFT JOIN users AS u ON u.div_id=d.id WHERE u.status=1 AND u.role_id=1 GROUP BY d.div_code ORDER BY DIV_TRAINEE DESC

description: Counts records in users, designations for the trainee data.inc page.
complete_sql: SELECT d.desi_code, COUNT(u.id) AS DESI_TRAINEE FROM designations d LEFT JOIN users AS u ON u.desi_id=d.id WHERE u.status=1 AND u.role_id=1 GROUP BY d.desi_code ORDER BY DESI_TRAINEE DESC

description: Counts records in users, pay_level for the trainee data.inc page.
complete_sql: SELECT pl.g_level, pl.g_pay, COUNT(u.id) AS GRADE_TRAINEE FROM pay_level pl LEFT JOIN users AS u ON u.pay_level=pl.id WHERE u.status=1 AND u.role_id=1 GROUP BY pl.g_level ORDER BY GRADE_TRAINEE DESC

description: Counts records in departments, users for the trainee data.inc page.
complete_sql: SELECT d.department_name, COUNT(u.id) AS DEPRT_TRAINEE FROM departments d LEFT JOIN users AS u ON u.dep_id=d.id WHERE u.status=1 AND u.role_id=1 GROUP BY d.department_name ORDER BY DEPRT_TRAINEE DESC

description: Counts records in qualification, users for the trainee data.inc page.
complete_sql: SELECT q.qualification, COUNT(u.id) AS QUALI_TRAINEE FROM qualification q LEFT JOIN users AS u ON u.qualification=q.id WHERE u.status=1 AND u.role_id=1 GROUP BY q.qualification ORDER BY QUALI_TRAINEE DESC
